root.name: All API Services
root.description: Root node containing all API services across all functional domains

cat_sub1.name: Finance & Banking
cat_sub1.description: Services for managing money, investments, banking, and financial markets.
cat_sub1.boundary: Includes: Banking APIs, payment processing, investment tracking, stock/forex/crypto market data, financial analytics, accounting, and tax services. Excludes: General business operations (see Business & Employment) and cryptocurrency as a digital asset/technology (see Cryptocurrency & Digital Assets).
cat_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary purpose is to facilitate or provide data on monetary transactions, asset management, financial markets, or personal/corporate finance.

cat_sub10.name: News & Media
cat_sub10.description: Services providing news articles, media content, and current events information.
cat_sub10.boundary: Includes: News agency feeds, article aggregation, media monitoring, press releases, and publishing platforms. Excludes: Social media feeds (see Social Media & Communication) and academic/scientific publications (see Science & Research).
cat_sub10.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's core function is to distribute or provide access to journalistic content and current events reporting.

cat_sub11.name: Cryptocurrency & Digital Assets
cat_sub11.description: Services for trading, tracking, and managing cryptocurrencies and digital assets.
cat_sub11.boundary: Includes: Crypto exchange rates, blockchain explorers, wallet services, NFT marketplaces, and DeFi protocols. Excludes: Traditional financial market data (see Finance & Banking) and general blockchain-as-a-technology tools.
cat_sub11.decision_rule: Classify here if the service is specifically for interacting with or obtaining data on cryptocurrencies, tokens, NFTs, or blockchain-based digital assets.

cat_sub12.name: Weather & Climate
cat_sub12.description: Services providing weather forecasts, climate data, and atmospheric conditions.
cat_sub12.boundary: Includes: Current weather, forecasts, historical climate data, severe weather alerts, and environmental sensors. Excludes: Agricultural data (see Science & Research) and general location data (see Geography & Maps).
cat_sub12.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data or predictions about atmospheric conditions, weather, or long-term climate patterns.

cat_sub14.name: Education & Reference
cat_sub14.description: Services for learning, educational content, and reference information.
cat_sub14.boundary: Includes: Online courses, educational resources, dictionaries, encyclopedias, language learning, and academic tools. Excludes: Professional training/certifications (see Business & Employment) and scientific research data (see Science & Research).
cat_sub14.decision_rule: Classify here if the service is designed for knowledge acquisition, teaching, or providing general reference information.

cat_sub15.name: Social Media & Communication
cat_sub15.description: Services for social networking, messaging, communication, and community engagement.
cat_sub15.boundary: Includes: Social network APIs, messaging/chat platforms, video conferencing, online forums, and community group management. Excludes: News distribution (see News & Media) and professional networking/job boards (see Business & Employment).
cat_sub15.decision_rule: Classify here if the service enables interpersonal communication, social networking, or online community interaction.

cat_sub16.name: Business & Employment
cat_sub16.description: Services for jobs, hiring, business ops, market research, logistics, and analytics.
cat_sub16.boundary: Includes: Job boards, recruitment tools, CRM, ERP, market research data, B2B procurement, logistics/supply chain tracking, and web/performance analytics. Excludes: Personal finance (see Finance & Banking) and general scientific data (see Science & Research).
cat_sub16.decision_rule: Classify here if the service supports business operations, employment, B2B services, market analysis, or commercial logistics.

cat_sub17.name: Science & Research
cat_sub17.description: Services providing scientific data, research tools, academic info, and environmental metrics.
cat_sub17.boundary: Includes: Academic databases, research papers, scientific datasets (biology, physics, chemistry, agriculture), environmental/energy data, and simulation tools. Excludes: Health/medical data (see Healthcare & Wellness) and general reference (see Education & Reference).
cat_sub17.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data or tools for academic, scientific, or environmental research purposes.

cat_sub18.name: Real Estate & Property
cat_sub18.description: Services for buying, selling, renting, and managing properties.
cat_sub18.boundary: Includes: Property listings, rental market data, mortgage calculators, real estate valuations, and property management. Excludes: General geographic/GIS data (see Geography & Maps) and construction/architecture services.
cat_sub18.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides information or tools specifically for residential or commercial real estate transactions and management.

cat_sub2.name: Sports & Fitness
cat_sub2.description: Services related to sports events, teams, statistics, and athletic activities.
cat_sub2.boundary: Includes: Live scores, player/team stats, sports news, league data, fitness tracking, and workout planning. Excludes: General event ticketing (see Arts, Culture & Events) and health/medical data (see Healthcare & Wellness).
cat_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data or functionality specifically for following sports, athletic competitions, or personal fitness activities.

cat_sub22.name: Security, Privacy & Compliance
cat_sub22.description: Services for cybersecurity, data protection, privacy, and regulatory compliance.
cat_sub22.boundary: Includes: Threat intelligence, vulnerability scanning, encryption, authentication, data anonymization, and compliance auditing. Excludes: Physical security systems and general software development tools.
cat_sub22.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary purpose is to enhance cybersecurity, protect data privacy, or ensure regulatory compliance.

cat_sub28.name: Arts, Culture & Events
cat_sub28.description: Services for arts, cultural content, creative expression, events, and gaming.
cat_sub28.boundary: Includes: Museum collections, event ticketing, performing arts info, book/author databases, video game data, and gaming platforms. Excludes: Movies/TV (see Movies & Entertainment) and music (see Music & Audio).
cat_sub28.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data on cultural artifacts, creative works (non-audiovisual), live events, or video games/interactive entertainment.

cat_sub3.name: Shopping & Retail
cat_sub3.description: Services for finding, comparing, and purchasing consumer goods.
cat_sub3.boundary: Includes: Product catalogs, price comparison, e-commerce platforms, retail inventory, and customer reviews. Excludes: Business-to-business procurement (see Business & Employment) and digital content marketplaces (see Product & Content Management).
cat_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service enables the discovery, evaluation, or transaction of physical consumer products for end-users.

cat_sub4.name: Travel & Transportation
cat_sub4.description: Services for planning trips, booking travel, and getting around.
cat_sub4.boundary: Includes: Flight/hotel/car rental bookings, ride-sharing, public transit info, trip planning, and travel advisories. Excludes: Logistics/shipping for goods (see Business & Employment) and general mapping/navigation (see Geography & Maps).
cat_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service facilitates personal or business travel, accommodation, or local transportation for people.

cat_sub41.name: Product & Content Management
cat_sub41.description: Services for managing product catalogs, digital content, tags, and metadata.
cat_sub41.boundary: Includes: PIM, DAM, CMS APIs, digital asset management, tagging, and metadata enrichment. Excludes: E-commerce transaction APIs (see Shopping & Retail) and general data transformation (see General Data & API Tools).
cat_sub41.decision_rule: Classify here if the service is designed to manage and organize structured information about products or digital content assets.

cat_sub42.name: General Data & API Tools
cat_sub42.description: Services for API utilities, data lookup, validation, processing, and visualization.
cat_sub42.boundary: Includes: API development/testing tools, data validation/cleaning, format conversion, identifier generation, and basic data visualization creation. Excludes: Domain-specific data services and business intelligence/analytics platforms.
cat_sub42.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides general-purpose data manipulation, API utilities, or foundational data access tools not tied to a specific domain.

cat_sub43.name: Order & Transaction Management
cat_sub43.description: Services for retrieving, managing, and processing specific orders and transactions.
cat_sub43.boundary: Includes: APIs to look up order details, transaction status, user-specific data lists, and paginated data retrieval endpoints. Excludes: Payment processing (see Finance & Banking) and e-commerce platforms (see Shopping & Retail).
cat_sub43.decision_rule: Classify here if the API endpoint is primarily designed to retrieve or manage specific records, orders, or transactions based on identifiers or user context.

cat_sub5.name: Geography & Maps
cat_sub5.description: Services providing geographic data, mapping, location, and government/public safety info.
cat_sub5.boundary: Includes: Maps, geocoding, navigation, GIS data, satellite imagery, public safety alerts, disaster data, and government datasets (census, regulations). Excludes: Weather/climate data (see Weather & Climate) and business location data (see Business & Employment).
cat_sub5.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides foundational geographic/location data, mapping tools, or public sector/government information.

cat_sub6.name: Movies & Entertainment
cat_sub6.description: Services for discovering, watching, and managing video and entertainment content.
cat_sub6.boundary: Includes: Movie/TV show databases, streaming platform APIs, entertainment news, ratings, and actor/film metadata. Excludes: General news/media (see News & Media) and gaming (see Arts, Culture & Events).
cat_sub6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service is primarily focused on film, television, or streaming video content.

cat_sub7.name: Food & Dining
cat_sub7.description: Services related to food, recipes, restaurants, dining, and beverages.
cat_sub7.boundary: Includes: Restaurant listings/reviews, recipe databases, food delivery, nutritional data, and beverage information. Excludes: Agricultural/commodity data (see Science & Research) and general retail (see Shopping & Retail).
cat_sub7.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides information or facilitates transactions related to food consumption, preparation, or dining experiences.

cat_sub8.name: Music & Audio
cat_sub8.description: Services for listening to, discovering, and managing music and audio content.
cat_sub8.boundary: Includes: Music streaming, artist/song metadata, lyrics, podcasts, audio recognition, and radio. Excludes: General audio/video conferencing (see Social Media & Communication) and sound effect libraries for games (see Arts, Culture & Events).
cat_sub8.decision_rule: Classify here if the service is primarily focused on musical content, audio streaming, or podcasting.

cat_sub9.name: Healthcare & Wellness
cat_sub9.description: Services related to medical information, health tracking, wellness, and healthcare providers.
cat_sub9.boundary: Includes: Medical databases, symptom checkers, fitness/health tracker integration, provider directories, insurance, and pharmaceutical data. Excludes: General scientific research (see Science & Research) and dietary/nutritional info (see Food & Dining).
cat_sub9.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data or tools specifically for medical, health, or personal wellness purposes.

cat_fin_1.name: Equity Market Data
cat_fin_1.description: Real-time and historical data for individual stocks and equity indices, including quotes and fundamental metrics.
cat_fin_1.boundary: Focuses on equity securities. Excludes data for other asset classes, generic 'market' endpoints, and trading execution.
cat_fin_1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data/analysis specifically for stocks or stock indices. Do NOT classify generic market data APIs that cover multiple asset types.

cat_fin_10.name: Technical Analysis & Indicators
cat_fin_10.description: Calculated technical indicators (RSI, MACD), chart patterns, and price/volume-based analytics.
cat_fin_10.boundary: Focuses on derived indicators from price/volume. Excludes fundamental data and raw data feeds without analysis.
cat_fin_10.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides calculated technical indicators or pattern recognition.

cat_fin_11.name: Trading, Brokerage & Execution Platforms
cat_fin_11.description: Services for placing/managing trade orders, brokerage account management, and trade execution platforms.
cat_fin_11.boundary: Focuses on live trade lifecycle, brokerage functions, and trading platforms. Excludes market data and analytics.
cat_fin_11.decision_rule: Classify here if the service enables submitting/managing trade orders, manages brokerage accounts, or provides a trading platform.

cat_fin_12.name: Portfolio Management & Analytics
cat_fin_12.description: Tracking, analyzing, and optimizing investment portfolios, including performance and risk metrics.
cat_fin_12.boundary: Focuses on collections of holdings. Excludes single-asset data queries and direct trading execution.
cat_fin_12.decision_rule: Classify here if the service manages or analyzes a portfolio of multiple holdings.

cat_fin_13.name: Banking & Account Services
cat_fin_13.description: Core banking: account management, balances, transactions, transfers, and card services.
cat_fin_13.boundary: Focuses on deposit accounts and transactions. Excludes investment trading, market data, and lending.
cat_fin_13.decision_rule: Classify here if the service manages bank deposit accounts, transactions, or cards.

cat_fin_14.name: Payments & Transfers
cat_fin_14.description: Processing payments, remittances, and funds transfers between parties, including currency conversion.
cat_fin_14.boundary: Focuses on payment initiation and settlement. Excludes banking account management and crypto payment rails.
cat_fin_14.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily initiates or processes a payment or funds transfer.

cat_fin_15.name: Credit, Lending & Insurance
cat_fin_15.description: Loans, credit lines, mortgages, credit assessment, and insurance policy management/quotes.
cat_fin_15.boundary: Focuses on borrowing, credit, and insurance products. Excludes deposit accounts and payment processing.
cat_fin_15.decision_rule: Classify here if the service facilitates borrowing, credit analysis, loan management, or insurance services.

cat_fin_16.name: Financial Planning & Calculations
cat_fin_16.description: Tools for financial calculations: future value, loan payments, retirement planning, tax, and accounting.
cat_fin_16.boundary: Focuses on standalone calculation and planning tools. Excludes real-time data feeds and portfolio management.
cat_fin_16.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides a financial calculation, projection, tax, or accounting tool.

cat_fin_2.name: Foreign Exchange (Forex) Data
cat_fin_2.description: Exchange rates, historical data, and analytics for fiat currency pairs.
cat_fin_2.boundary: Focuses on fiat currencies. Excludes crypto, other asset data, and payment execution services.
cat_fin_2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data/analysis specifically for forex rates. Do NOT classify generic market data APIs that cover multiple asset types.

cat_fin_21.name: Sports Betting & Odds Data
cat_fin_21.description: Odds data, betting lines, and event information for sports betting markets.
cat_fin_21.boundary: Focuses on betting odds and related sports event data. Excludes traditional financial market data.
cat_fin_21.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides odds, betting lines, or event data for sports betting.

cat_fin_22.name: Financial Instrument Search & Metadata
cat_fin_22.description: Searching for securities, listing financial markets/exchanges, and retrieving instrument metadata.
cat_fin_22.boundary: Focuses on discovery and reference data for financial instruments and venues. Excludes real-time pricing and market data.
cat_fin_22.decision_rule: Classify here if the service searches for securities, lists markets/exchanges, or provides instrument metadata WITHOUT real-time pricing.

cat_fin_23.name: Generic Market Data & Quotes
cat_fin_23.description: Multi-asset or unspecified market data endpoints providing quotes, OHLC, or candlestick data.
cat_fin_23.boundary: Focuses on generic price data feeds not specific to a single asset class. Excludes asset-specific data categories.
cat_fin_23.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides price/quotes/OHLC data for unspecified or multiple asset types from a generic endpoint.

cat_fin_3.name: Cryptocurrency Market Data
cat_fin_3.description: Prices, market cap, volume, and on-chain data for cryptocurrencies and digital tokens.
cat_fin_3.boundary: Focuses on crypto assets. Excludes traditional asset data and crypto wallet/payment services.
cat_fin_3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data/analysis specifically for cryptocurrencies. Do NOT classify generic market data APIs that cover multiple asset types.

cat_fin_4.name: Derivatives & Options Data
cat_fin_4.description: Data for options, futures, and other derivatives, including pricing, volatility, and expiration.
cat_fin_4.boundary: Focuses on derivative contracts. Excludes data for the underlying assets and trading execution.
cat_fin_4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data/analysis specifically for financial derivatives. Do NOT classify generic market data APIs that cover multiple asset types.

cat_fin_5.name: Fixed Income, Commodity & Alternative Data
cat_fin_5.description: Data for bonds, commodities, and other non-equity assets, including yields, prices, and credit ratings.
cat_fin_5.boundary: Focuses on debt securities, physical commodities, and other alternative assets. Excludes equity, forex, and fund data.
cat_fin_5.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data specifically for bonds, commodities, or other non-equity/forex/crypto assets.

cat_fin_6.name: Fund & ETF Data
cat_fin_6.description: Data for mutual funds, ETFs, and pooled vehicles, including NAV, holdings, and performance.
cat_fin_6.boundary: Focuses on pooled investment products. Excludes data for individual stocks or direct commodities.
cat_fin_6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides data/analysis specifically for funds or ETFs. Do NOT classify generic market data APIs that cover multiple asset types.

cat_fin_8.name: Company Fundamentals, Filings & ESG
cat_fin_8.description: Corporate financial statements, regulatory filings, fundamental ratios, and ESG/sustainability scores.
cat_fin_8.boundary: Focuses on structured corporate data and official documents. Excludes real-time quotes, news, and price charts.
cat_fin_8.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides structured financial data, filings, or ESG metrics for companies.

cat_fin_9.name: Financial News, Sentiment & Macro Data
cat_fin_9.description: News articles, market sentiment indicators, and macroeconomic data (GDP, inflation, unemployment).
cat_fin_9.boundary: Focuses on textual/news content and broad economic indicators. Excludes raw market data and financial statements.
cat_fin_9.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides news, commentary, sentiment analysis, or macroeconomic statistics.

cat_sub10_sub1.name: Financial & Markets News
cat_sub10_sub1.description: News, analysis, and trends related to stocks, investments, forex, cryptocurrencies, and market movements.
cat_sub10_sub1.boundary: Focus on trading, investments, and market price movements. Excludes general business news and economic policy.
cat_sub10_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about stock prices, trading, investments, market trends, forex, or cryptocurrencies, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub10.name: Media & Content Intelligence
cat_sub10_sub10.description: Services tracking brand mentions, media exposure, sentiment, coverage, and content processing.
cat_sub10_sub10.boundary: Focus on measurement, analysis, and processing of media content. Excludes news delivery and source metadata.
cat_sub10_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes, monitors, or processes media coverage (sentiment, mentions, extraction, summarization), classify here.

cat_sub10_sub11.name: Regional & Local News
cat_sub10_sub11.description: News content specific to a particular country, city, or geographic region as the core focus.
cat_sub10_sub11.boundary: Region must be the primary organizing principle. Excludes topical news with regional filters.
cat_sub10_sub11.decision_rule: If the service's primary focus is to provide news from or about a specific geographic area, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub12.name: News Infrastructure & Distribution
cat_sub10_sub12.description: Services for publishing, distributing, syndicating news, or providing source metadata.
cat_sub10_sub12.boundary: Focus on content distribution mechanisms and source information rather than content creation or consumption.
cat_sub10_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily facilitates publishing/distributing news or provides metadata about news sources, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub13.name: Video & Multimedia Content
cat_sub10_sub13.description: Services focused on video news, multimedia content, or recommendations for visual media.
cat_sub10_sub13.boundary: Focus on video content, multimedia news, or recommendations for visual media. Excludes text-based news services.
cat_sub10_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides or recommends video news, multimedia content, or visual media, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub2.name: Business & Economic News
cat_sub10_sub2.description: News about companies, corporate developments, industry trends, economic indicators, and government policy.
cat_sub10_sub2.boundary: Covers both microeconomic (company/industry) and macroeconomic (policy/indicators) news. Excludes financial market trading news.
cat_sub10_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about specific companies, industries, economic indicators (GDP, unemployment), or government economic policy, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub3.name: Science & Technology News
cat_sub10_sub3.description: News about scientific discoveries, research, technology innovations, and IT industry developments.
cat_sub10_sub3.boundary: Focus on research breakthroughs and technological advancements. Excludes business news about tech companies and entertainment tech.
cat_sub10_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about scientific discoveries, research, or technology (IT, software, hardware) advancements, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub4.name: Health & Environment News
cat_sub10_sub4.description: News covering medical research, public health, disease outbreaks, environmental issues, and climate change.
cat_sub10_sub4.boundary: Combines health/medical topics with environmental/climate topics. Excludes general science news without health/environment focus.
cat_sub10_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about medical conditions, treatments, public health, disease outbreaks, climate change, pollution, or conservation, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub5.name: Entertainment & Sports News
cat_sub10_sub5.description: News about movies, TV, music, celebrities, sports events, teams, athletes, and leagues.
cat_sub10_sub5.boundary: Combines entertainment industry news with sports coverage. Excludes business news about media/sports companies.
cat_sub10_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about films, TV shows, music, celebrities, sports events, teams, or athlete performances, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub7.name: General, Personalized & Breaking News
cat_sub10_sub7.description: Broad news feeds, top headlines, breaking news, and content curated based on user preferences.
cat_sub10_sub7.boundary: Includes both unfiltered general news and personalized/recommended feeds. Excludes topic-specific news feeds.
cat_sub10_sub7.decision_rule: If the service provides general multi-topic news feeds, breaking news alerts, or tailors/recommends content based on user preferences, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub8.name: News Discovery & Aggregation
cat_sub10_sub8.description: Services for searching, filtering, retrieving, or discovering news content from multiple sources.
cat_sub10_sub8.boundary: Focus on search, discovery, and aggregation of articles. Excludes pre-defined topic feeds and content processing.
cat_sub10_sub8.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to let users search, filter, retrieve, or discover news articles from multiple sources, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub9.name: Trend & Popularity Tracking
cat_sub10_sub9.description: Services that identify, rank, or report on trending topics, viral content, and most-read articles.
cat_sub10_sub9.boundary: Focus on popularity metrics and trending algorithms. Excludes standard news lists without ranking focus.
cat_sub10_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily identifies, lists, or ranks what is currently popular, trending, or most viewed/searched, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub1.name: Cryptocurrency Market Data
cat_sub11_sub1.description: Real-time and historical price, volume, market cap, and exchange rate data for cryptocurrencies.
cat_sub11_sub1.boundary: Focuses on current and historical market metrics for crypto assets. Excludes derived analytics, trading tools, and mixed-asset data.
cat_sub11_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides price, volume, market cap, or exchange rate data for cryptocurrencies, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub10.name: News & Expert Analysis
cat_sub11_sub10.description: Services aggregating crypto news, social feeds, and curated expert commentary or research reports.
cat_sub11_sub10.boundary: Focuses on human-curated information and commentary. Excludes automated analytics and raw data feeds.
cat_sub11_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily aggregates news/social feeds OR delivers human-generated expert opinions/research, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub11.name: Exchange & Infrastructure Data
cat_sub11_sub11.description: Services providing metadata about exchanges, supported blockchains, or other crypto infrastructure.
cat_sub11_sub11.boundary: Focuses on descriptive metadata about entities. Excludes trading data on exchanges or on-chain data from blockchains.
cat_sub11_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily lists or describes entities like exchanges, blockchains, or projects, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub12.name: Cross-Asset & Commodity Data
cat_sub11_sub12.description: Services providing data mixing cryptocurrencies with traditional assets (stocks, forex) or commodities.
cat_sub11_sub12.boundary: Focuses on data feeds that include crypto alongside other asset classes. Excludes crypto-only data services.
cat_sub11_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data that mixes cryptocurrencies with traditional financial assets or commodities, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub2.name: Cryptocurrency Trading & Analysis
cat_sub11_sub2.description: Services for trade execution, market analysis (technical indicators, liquidation data), and trade simulation.
cat_sub11_sub2.boundary: Focuses on tools and data for active trading decisions. Excludes simple price feeds and protocol-specific DeFi operations.
cat_sub11_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily facilitates trading analysis, provides trading signals/indicators, or simulates trade outcomes, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub3.name: Blockchain State & Transactions
cat_sub11_sub3.description: Services for querying raw blockchain data: blocks, transactions, addresses, and native token balances.
cat_sub11_sub3.boundary: Focuses on the foundational state of a blockchain. Excludes token-specific data, market data, and derived analytics.
cat_sub11_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves data about blocks, native chain transactions, or native token (e.g., ETH, BTC) balances, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub4.name: Token & DeFi Data
cat_sub11_sub4.description: Services for token balances (ERC-20, etc.), prices, liquidity, and aggregated DeFi protocol data (TVL, yields).
cat_sub11_sub4.boundary: Focuses on data for smart contract-based tokens and aggregated DeFi metrics. Excludes native blockchain tokens and direct protocol interactions.
cat_sub11_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves token balances/prices, DEX liquidity, or aggregated DeFi protocol metrics (TVL, APY), classify here.

cat_sub11_sub6.name: NFT Market Data
cat_sub11_sub6.description: Services providing price, ranking, trend, and statistical data (e.g., floor price) for NFT collections.
cat_sub11_sub6.boundary: Focuses on market-level statistics and trends for NFTs. Excludes wallet-specific holdings and historical event logs.
cat_sub11_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides market-level data, trends, or statistics about NFT collections, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub7.name: NFT Asset & Activity
cat_sub11_sub7.description: Services for querying NFT holdings by wallet/collection and retrieving NFT event history (sales, transfers).
cat_sub11_sub7.boundary: Focuses on asset ownership and historical activity logs for NFTs. Excludes current market statistics.
cat_sub11_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily lists NFT assets for a wallet/collection OR retrieves a history of NFT events, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub8.name: Wallet & Transaction Services
cat_sub11_sub8.description: Services for managing wallets, simulating transactions, and verifying payment/transaction status.
cat_sub11_sub8.boundary: Focuses on wallet-level operations and transaction verification. Excludes querying specific asset balances or blockchain state.
cat_sub11_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs wallet operations (funds, activity) or verifies specific payment/transaction status, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub9.name: On-Chain & Market Analytics
cat_sub11_sub9.description: Services providing derived insights from blockchain data, market trends, and social sentiment.
cat_sub11_sub9.boundary: Focuses on analytical insights, rankings, and sentiment derived from raw data. Excludes raw data feeds and expert commentary.
cat_sub11_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides derived analytics, rankings, trends, or sentiment from on-chain/market data, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub1.name: General Current Conditions
cat_sub12_sub1.description: Real-time weather data for a specified location, including temperature, humidity, and atmospheric readings.
cat_sub12_sub1.boundary: Point-in-time data only. Excludes forecasts, historical data, and processed recommendations.
cat_sub12_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides weather conditions at the present moment or a very recent snapshot, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub12.name: Energy & Infrastructure
cat_sub12_sub12.description: Applies weather data to optimize or assess energy systems, infrastructure resilience, and utility planning.
cat_sub12_sub12.boundary: Energy metrics and infrastructure impact. Excludes general temperature data and agricultural applications.
cat_sub12_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates energy metrics or assesses weather impact on infrastructure/energy production, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub14.name: Hydrological Data
cat_sub12_sub14.description: Focused on water-related weather data, including precipitation, snowfall accumulation, and flood potential.
cat_sub12_sub14.boundary: Precipitation and snow measurements. Excludes general weather forecasts and tidal data.
cat_sub12_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides measurements or forecasts of precipitation, snowfall, or snowpack, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub16.name: Comprehensive Weather Data
cat_sub12_sub16.description: Services that return a wide array of current, forecast, and sometimes historical weather parameters in a single response.
cat_sub12_sub16.boundary: Multi-parameter, all-in-one data delivery. Excludes single-purpose data (e.g., only current conditions) and pure recommendations.
cat_sub12_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily returns a broad set of weather information (e.g., current, forecast, and sometimes historical data) together in one response, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub2.name: General Forecasts
cat_sub12_sub2.description: Predictions of future weather conditions over standard periods (hourly, daily, weekly) for general use.
cat_sub12_sub2.boundary: Standard future predictions. Includes AI/ML-based forecasts. Excludes long-term climate projections and sport-specific forecasts.
cat_sub12_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides predictions of future weather for general informational purposes, classify here. This includes services emphasizing AI/ML as their forecasting method.

cat_sub12_sub4.name: Location & Geocoding
cat_sub12_sub4.description: Services that resolve, search for, or validate geographic locations for use with other weather services.
cat_sub12_sub4.boundary: Pure geographic reference. Excludes providing actual weather data for those locations.
cat_sub12_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily converts between location identifiers or searches for places without returning weather data, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub5.name: Activity & Lifestyle Planning
cat_sub12_sub5.description: Uses weather data to generate recommendations for daily activities, travel, clothing, or route optimization.
cat_sub12_sub5.boundary: Output is a recommendation or optimized plan. Excludes raw weather data and sport-specific forecasts.
cat_sub12_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily outputs a lifestyle recommendation or optimized travel route based on weather input, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub6.name: Sports & Recreation Forecasts
cat_sub12_sub6.description: Weather forecasts tailored to the needs of specific outdoor sports or recreational activities.
cat_sub12_sub6.boundary: Sport-specific parameters. Excludes general forecasts and general activity recommendations.
cat_sub12_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides weather forecasts parameterized for a specific sport or recreational activity, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub7.name: Maritime & Nautical
cat_sub12_sub7.description: Weather, sea state, and tidal data critical for marine navigation, sailing, and coastal activities.
cat_sub12_sub7.boundary: Marine-specific data for safety/navigation. Excludes general coastal forecasts and surfing reports.
cat_sub12_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data on tides, sea conditions, or marine-specific weather for navigation, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub9.name: Historical Climate Data
cat_sub12_sub9.description: Access to verified past weather records, historical averages, and aggregated statistical time-series data.
cat_sub12_sub9.boundary: Recorded past data and extended time-series. Excludes current conditions, forecasts, and future projections.
cat_sub12_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to recorded weather data from the past or delivers long, continuous sequences of data points, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub1.name: Language & Linguistics
cat_sub14_sub1.description: Services for learning languages, translation, definitions, sign language, and linguistic analysis.
cat_sub14_sub1.boundary: Includes spoken/written language learning, translation tools, dictionaries, sign language resources, and linguistic structure analysis. Excludes literature analysis (see Literature & Books).
cat_sub14_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides language learning, translation, word/sign definitions, or linguistic analysis, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub10.name: How-To & Procedural Guides
cat_sub14_sub10.description: Services that provide step-by-step instructions, tutorials, or guides for completing specific tasks.
cat_sub14_sub10.boundary: Includes sequences of steps or instructions to accomplish a specific task or solve a problem. Excludes full courses or specialized craft skills.
cat_sub14_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a sequence of steps or instructions to accomplish a specific task, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub11.name: Personalized Learning & Tutoring
cat_sub14_sub11.description: Services creating customized learning plans, matching tutors, or providing adapted education.
cat_sub14_sub11.boundary: Includes personalized learning schedules, tutor/mentor matching, and education adapted for special needs. Excludes general educational platforms.
cat_sub14_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily generates personalized learning plans, finds tutors, or offers education adapted for special requirements, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub12.name: Humanities & Social Studies
cat_sub14_sub12.description: Services for learning about history, cultural practices, geography, and regional data.
cat_sub14_sub12.boundary: Includes knowledge about past events, cultural traditions, mythology, and geographical/physical locations. Excludes religious studies.
cat_sub14_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides knowledge about history, culture, mythology, or geographical locations/data, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub13.name: Educational Data & API Services
cat_sub14_sub13.description: Technical services providing educational data, content APIs, or integration tools for developers.
cat_sub14_sub13.boundary: Includes APIs, datasets, and developer tools specifically for accessing or integrating educational content. Excludes educational content itself.
cat_sub14_sub13.decision_rule: If the service is a technical/API tool primarily for developers to access or integrate educational data/content, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub14.name: Technical & Developer Education
cat_sub14_sub14.description: Services for learning programming, software development, APIs, data science, and technical tools.
cat_sub14_sub14.boundary: Includes tutorials, documentation, and learning resources for coding, APIs, data analysis, and developer tools. Excludes general computer literacy.
cat_sub14_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides learning resources about programming, software development, APIs, or data science, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub2.name: Religious & Theological Studies
cat_sub14_sub2.description: Services providing religious texts, scriptures, theological queries, and religious knowledge.
cat_sub14_sub2.boundary: Includes content from or about religious texts, scriptures, rituals, and theological principles. Excludes mythology (see Humanities & Social Studies).
cat_sub14_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides content from or about religious texts, scriptures, or theological principles, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub3.name: Literature & Books
cat_sub14_sub3.description: Services for finding books, authors, literary content, quotes, and proverbs.
cat_sub14_sub3.boundary: Includes book/search recommendations, author metadata, literary analysis, and curated quotes/proverbs. Excludes general writing tools or language learning.
cat_sub14_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for, recommends, or provides metadata/details about books, authors, or famous quotes, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub4.name: Academic & Study Tools
cat_sub14_sub4.description: Services for studying, problem-solving, test prep, progress tracking, and citation management.
cat_sub14_sub4.boundary: Includes study aids, homework help, exam preparation, grade tracking, and citation/bibliography tools. Excludes full courses (see Educational Content Platforms).
cat_sub14_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily helps with studying, solving problems, taking tests, tracking progress, or managing citations, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub5.name: Encyclopedic & Reference
cat_sub14_sub5.description: Services that function as general knowledge bases, encyclopedias, or trivia sources for factual lookup.
cat_sub14_sub5.boundary: Includes broad, multi-topic factual databases, encyclopedia-style information services, and trivia/curiosity-driven knowledge. Excludes specialized educational content (see other subject categories).
cat_sub14_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily acts as a broad knowledge base for factual lookup or provides general trivia/facts, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub6.name: Educational Content Platforms
cat_sub14_sub6.description: Services providing structured courses, learning modules, and interactive/game-based education.
cat_sub14_sub6.boundary: Includes full courses, learning paths, aggregated content platforms, and educational games/simulations. Excludes simple tutorials (see How-To & Procedural Guides).
cat_sub14_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to courses, learning paths, or educational games/simulations, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub7.name: Educational Administration
cat_sub14_sub7.description: Services for managing classroom logistics, scheduling, attendance, and institutional operations.
cat_sub14_sub7.boundary: Includes tools for scheduling, attendance, assignment management, and institutional administration. Excludes personalized learning plans (see Personalized Learning).
cat_sub14_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles the logistics or administrative tasks of an educational institution or class, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub8.name: Specialized Skills & Crafts
cat_sub14_sub8.description: Services for learning specific manual skills, arts, crafts, martial arts, or technical procedures.
cat_sub14_sub8.boundary: Includes instructions, tutorials, or knowledge for hands-on skills, crafts, arts, or martial arts. Excludes academic subjects or general how-tos.
cat_sub14_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides instructions or knowledge for a specific hands-on skill, craft, or martial art, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub9.name: Science & Nature Education
cat_sub14_sub9.description: Services providing educational content about scientific fields, animals, plants, and natural phenomena.
cat_sub14_sub9.boundary: Includes factual knowledge or learning resources about scientific topics or the natural world. Excludes technical/procedural skills.
cat_sub14_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides factual knowledge or learning resources about scientific topics or the natural world, classify here.

cat_sub15_sub1.name: Content Discovery & Search
cat_sub15_sub1.description: Services for searching, browsing, and discovering content (videos, posts, music, channels) across social platforms.
cat_sub15_sub1.boundary: Excludes analyzing content/engagement (see Analytics & Insights) and managing/scheduling content uploads (see Content Management & Publishing).
cat_sub15_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables finding, retrieving, or listing public content (videos, posts, channels, music) based on queries, keywords, or trends, classify here.

cat_sub15_sub10.name: Email Services
cat_sub15_sub10.description: Services for sending, receiving, managing, and interacting with email messages and accounts.
cat_sub15_sub10.boundary: Excludes SMS/text messaging (see Direct Messaging & Chat) and other forms of direct communication.
cat_sub15_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles operations related to email (sending, receiving, managing inboxes, querying addresses), classify here.

cat_sub15_sub12.name: Community & Group Management
cat_sub15_sub12.description: Services for creating, managing, and analyzing online communities, forums, and social groups.
cat_sub15_sub12.boundary: Excludes analyzing individual posts (see Analytics & Insights) and managing one-to-one interactions (see Direct Messaging & Chat).
cat_sub15_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily focuses on the structure, membership, or activity of multi-user groups, forums, or communities, classify here.

cat_sub15_sub14.name: Monitoring & Alerts
cat_sub15_sub14.description: Services that monitor social platforms for specific triggers (keywords, stocks) and send notifications or alerts.
cat_sub15_sub14.boundary: Excludes broad trend analysis (see Analytics & Insights) and general content search (see Content Discovery & Search).
cat_sub15_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily watches for specific events or keywords and provides real-time alerts or notifications, classify here.

cat_sub15_sub15.name: Telephony & Number Services
cat_sub15_sub15.description: Services for managing phone numbers (virtual numbers), checking call/SMS status, and retrieving number lists.
cat_sub15_sub15.boundary: Excludes the content of SMS messages (see Direct Messaging & Chat) and voice/video call functionality (see Voice & Video Communication).
cat_sub15_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages the telephony infrastructure itself (numbers, status, pricing), rather than message/call content, classify here.

cat_sub15_sub16.name: Specialized Content Interaction
cat_sub15_sub16.description: Services for interacting with niche or platform-specific content types like music, lyrics, or sign language.
cat_sub15_sub16.boundary: Excludes general video/post interaction and mainstream social actions covered in other categories.
cat_sub15_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with a specialized content domain intrinsic to a platform (e.g., music on Spotify, lyrics on Genius, sign language in video), classify here.

cat_sub15_sub2.name: Content Metadata & Details
cat_sub15_sub2.description: Services for retrieving detailed information and metadata about specific content items (videos, posts, comments).
cat_sub15_sub2.boundary: Excludes searching for multiple items (see Content Discovery & Search) and downloading the actual media files (see Media Download & Retrieval).
cat_sub15_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves comprehensive metadata, statistics, or details for a single, specified piece of content (video, post, comment), classify here.

cat_sub15_sub3.name: User & Profile Information
cat_sub15_sub3.description: Services for retrieving public user data, profiles, follower lists, and user-generated content feeds.
cat_sub15_sub3.boundary: Excludes analyzing user activity/engagement (see Analytics & Insights) and managing a user's own account/actions (see Account & Identity Management).
cat_sub15_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches public data about a user, their profile, or the content they have posted (their feed, likes), classify here.

cat_sub15_sub6.name: Content Generation & Enhancement
cat_sub15_sub6.description: Services that generate or suggest content (captions, hashtags, descriptions) to enhance social media posts.
cat_sub15_sub6.boundary: Excludes the actual publishing/scheduling of that content (see Content Management & Publishing) and analyzing its performance (see Analytics & Insights).
cat_sub15_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, suggests, or optimizes textual/graphical elements (hashtags, captions, descriptions) for social content, classify here.

cat_sub15_sub7.name: Analytics & Insights
cat_sub15_sub7.description: Services that analyze content performance, user engagement, social reach, trends, and provide data-driven insights.
cat_sub15_sub7.boundary: Excludes raw data retrieval (see Content Discovery & Search, Content Metadata & Details) and monitoring for specific alerts (see Monitoring & Alerts).
cat_sub15_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides analysis, metrics, trends, or insights derived from social data (engagement, reach, sentiment), classify here.

cat_sub15_sub9.name: Direct Messaging & Chat
cat_sub15_sub9.description: Services for sending and receiving direct text-based messages (SMS, in-app chat) between users.
cat_sub15_sub9.boundary: Excludes voice/video calls (see Voice & Video Communication) and email services (see Email Services).
cat_sub15_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles the sending, receiving, or management of direct, private text messages (SMS, platform DMs), classify here.

cat_sub16_sub1.name: Recruitment & Job Search
cat_sub16_sub1.description: Services for posting, searching, and managing job listings, applicant tracking, and generating job-related documents.
cat_sub16_sub1.boundary: Focuses on connecting employers with candidates. Excludes managing existing employees.
cat_sub16_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily helps employers find candidates or helps candidates find jobs, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub10.name: SEO & Web Analytics
cat_sub16_sub10.description: Services for keyword research, SEO metric analysis, SERP analysis, and measuring website/domain performance.
cat_sub16_sub10.boundary: Focuses on search engine visibility and website traffic analysis. Excludes social media analytics and general market research.
cat_sub16_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes or optimizes for search engine visibility and website traffic, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub11.name: Brand & Social Analytics
cat_sub16_sub11.description: Services for analyzing brand reach, social media activity, forum engagement, and online reviews/ratings.
cat_sub16_sub11.boundary: Focuses on public perception and engagement on social/discussion platforms. Excludes SEO and ad campaign execution.
cat_sub16_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily measures public perception, engagement, and activity around a brand on social/discussion platforms, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub12.name: Business Planning, Finance & Documents
cat_sub16_sub12.description: Services for generating business plans, financial calculations, ROI, and creating/managing legal documents or agreements.
cat_sub16_sub12.boundary: Focuses on strategic planning, financial projection, and formal document creation/management. Excludes price data lookups.
cat_sub16_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily assists in strategic planning, financial projection, or creates/manages formal documents/agreements, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub13.name: Project & Operations Management
cat_sub16_sub13.description: Services for updating project status, tracking milestones, assigning tasks, and generating operational reports.
cat_sub16_sub13.boundary: Focuses on managing the timeline, tasks, and progress of internal projects or workflows. Excludes HR and logistics.
cat_sub16_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages the timeline, tasks, and progress of internal projects or operational workflows, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub14.name: Location, Travel & Booking
cat_sub16_sub14.description: Services for finding nearby places, generating maps, getting hours, and searching/booking travel tickets.
cat_sub16_sub14.boundary: Focuses on physical points of interest and passenger travel booking. Excludes logistics for goods and general directories.
cat_sub16_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds/books travel or provides information about physical points of interest, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub15.name: Business Directory & Listings
cat_sub16_sub15.description: Services for retrieving curated lists of companies, agencies, or professionals by category, location, or specialty.
cat_sub16_sub15.boundary: Focuses on curated or searchable lists of businesses/professionals. Excludes deep intelligence on a single company.
cat_sub16_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides curated or searchable lists of businesses or professionals by category, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub16.name: Real-time Data & Feeds
cat_sub16_sub16.description: Services providing live updates, such as train positions, news headlines, stock scores, and business data streams.
cat_sub16_sub16.boundary: Focuses on frequently updated, near real-time information streams. Excludes historical analysis and scheduled reports.
cat_sub16_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily delivers frequently updated, near real-time information streams or statuses, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub17.name: Professional & Personal Development
cat_sub16_sub17.description: Services for assessing skills, tracking certifications, development progress, or accessing personal counseling/coaching.
cat_sub16_sub17.boundary: Focuses on individual competency, growth, and personal support services. Excludes job search and internal HR training.
cat_sub16_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily assesses, tracks, or facilitates professional/personal development or support, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub2.name: HR & Workforce Management
cat_sub16_sub2.description: Services for managing employees, calculating compensation, tracking attendance, scheduling, and analyzing workforce trends.
cat_sub16_sub2.boundary: Focuses on managing existing employees and internal HR operations. Excludes recruitment and project management.
cat_sub16_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages existing employees, their schedules, pay, or internal development, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub3.name: Sales & Lead Generation
cat_sub16_sub3.description: Services for finding potential customers, managing contacts, tracking sales campaigns, and generating sales leads.
cat_sub16_sub3.boundary: Focuses on the front-end of the sales funnel. Excludes post-sale customer analysis and general company lookups.
cat_sub16_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily identifies, qualifies, or manages potential sales contacts and campaigns, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub4.name: Marketing & Advertising
cat_sub16_sub4.description: Services for creating marketing content, running ad campaigns, analyzing ad reach, and managing marketing assets.
cat_sub16_sub4.boundary: Focuses on creating and executing promotional campaigns. Excludes lead generation and brand/social media monitoring.
cat_sub16_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, executes, or measures the effectiveness of promotional campaigns and materials, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub5.name: Customer Analytics
cat_sub16_sub5.description: Services for analyzing customer behavior, segmenting customers, predicting churn, and evaluating loyalty.
cat_sub16_sub5.boundary: Focuses on analyzing existing customer data. Excludes market-wide research and sales lead generation.
cat_sub16_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes the behavior and value of existing customers, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub6.name: Logistics, Shipping & Procurement
cat_sub16_sub6.description: Services for tracking packages, calculating delivery, managing shipping, and B2B procurement/sourcing.
cat_sub16_sub6.boundary: Focuses on the physical movement of goods and business purchasing. Excludes passenger travel and internal project management.
cat_sub16_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily tracks/manages delivery of goods or facilitates business purchasing/sourcing, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub7.name: Professional Services & Appointments
cat_sub16_sub7.description: Services for booking, scheduling, or managing appointments with professionals like consultants, coaches, or advisors.
cat_sub16_sub7.boundary: Focuses on scheduling and accessing professional services. Excludes internal employee management and general business directories.
cat_sub16_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily facilitates booking or managing appointments with professional service providers, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub8.name: Company Intelligence & Verification
cat_sub16_sub8.description: Services for looking up verified company data, executive teams, financials, and validating official registrations.
cat_sub16_sub8.boundary: Focuses on retrieving verified facts about specific entities. Excludes sales leads, market analysis, and curated business lists.
cat_sub16_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves verified facts about a company or validates the authenticity of an entity/status, classify here.

cat_sub16_sub9.name: Market Research & Intelligence
cat_sub16_sub9.description: Services for analyzing market trends, competitor rankings, pricing data, and identifying product opportunities.
cat_sub16_sub9.boundary: Focuses on insights into market conditions, competitors, and industry trends. Excludes customer-specific analytics.
cat_sub16_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides insights into market conditions, competitor positioning, or industry trends, classify here.

cat_sub17_sub1.name: Environmental, Earth & Atmospheric Sciences
cat_sub17_sub1.description: Services for air quality, weather, seismic activity, geology, and earth science data.
cat_sub17_sub1.boundary: Covers atmospheric conditions, weather impacts, geological risks, and earth structure data.
cat_sub17_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data on air, weather, geology, earthquakes, or atmospheric/earth conditions, classify here. Excludes renewable energy potential and astronomical data.

cat_sub17_sub11.name: Social Sciences, Humanities & Ethics
cat_sub17_sub11.description: Services for research data in sociology, linguistics, ethics, cultural studies, and related human-focused disciplines.
cat_sub17_sub11.boundary: Covers data on human behavior, language, ethical principles, cultural artifacts, and social phenomena.
cat_sub17_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data or tools for social science, humanities, or ethical research (e.g., linguistics, sociology, religious studies), classify here. Excludes clinical health data and pure economic indicators.

cat_sub17_sub2.name: Astronomy & Space Science
cat_sub17_sub2.description: Services providing astronomical data, celestial object information, and space observation conditions.
cat_sub17_sub2.boundary: Covers stars, planets, space phenomena, and astronomical observation data.
cat_sub17_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data on stars, planets, space, or astronomical observation, classify here. Excludes terrestrial environmental and geological data.

cat_sub17_sub3.name: Biology, Genetics & Ecology
cat_sub17_sub3.description: Services for genetic data, species analysis, evolutionary studies, ecological assessment, and agricultural science.
cat_sub17_sub3.boundary: Covers DNA, genes, species evolution, biological sequences, ecological impact, and agricultural data.
cat_sub17_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data or tools for genetics, species identification, ecology, or agricultural science, classify here. Excludes human health risk assessments and biomedical patents.

cat_sub17_sub4.name: Energy Systems & Markets
cat_sub17_sub4.description: Services for energy prices, consumption prediction, grid data, and energy market information.
cat_sub17_sub4.boundary: Covers energy pricing, consumption patterns, grid operations, and market structures.
cat_sub17_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data on energy prices, consumption, or market structures, classify here. Excludes renewable energy potential assessment and geological energy sources.

cat_sub17_sub5.name: Academic, Research & Economic Data
cat_sub17_sub5.description: Services for research papers, academic news, literature synthesis, mentorship, and economic indicators.
cat_sub17_sub5.boundary: Covers academic literature, research connections, synthesis tools, and key economic data.
cat_sub17_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily assists in finding/managing academic literature, research connections, or provides major economic indicators, classify here. Excludes specific scientific datasets and patent information.

cat_sub17_sub7.name: Health, Biomedical & Epidemiological Research
cat_sub17_sub7.description: Services for clinical trials, health risk assessment, biomedical patents, and infectious disease data.
cat_sub17_sub7.boundary: Covers clinical trials, health risks, biomedical research, medical patents, and infectious disease statistics.
cat_sub17_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data on clinical trials, health risks, biomedical research, or the spread/statistics of diseases, classify here. Excludes general biological sequences and agricultural data.

cat_sub17_sub8.name: Engineering, Technology, Physical Sciences & Transportation
cat_sub17_sub8.description: Services for engineering simulations, material data, patents, physics, chemistry, and vehicle/transportation data.
cat_sub17_sub8.boundary: Covers engineering analysis, simulations, technological patents, material properties, physics/chemistry data, and vehicle/transportation specifications.
cat_sub17_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data or tools for engineering, technology, patents, physics, chemistry, material properties, or transportation systems/vehicles, classify here. Excludes pure biological and astronomical data.

cat_sub17_sub9.name: Renewable Energy & Sustainability
cat_sub17_sub9.description: Services for assessing solar potential, green energy composition, geothermal systems, and EV infrastructure.
cat_sub17_sub9.boundary: Covers renewable energy potential, sustainability metrics, and green infrastructure analysis.
cat_sub17_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data or analysis on renewable energy potential, sustainability, or green infrastructure, classify here. Excludes general energy market prices and building efficiency simulations.

cat_sub2_sub1.name: Motor Racing & Motorsports
cat_sub2_sub1.description: Services for Formula 1, NASCAR, IndyCar, and other motor racing series. Includes race data, driver/team stats, and circuit details.
cat_sub2_sub1.boundary: Focuses exclusively on motorized racing competitions. Excludes non-motor sports and general fitness tracking.
cat_sub2_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about Formula 1, NASCAR, IndyCar, or other motor racing competitions.

cat_sub2_sub10.name: Winter Sports
cat_sub2_sub10.description: Services for skiing, snowboarding, ice skating, and other winter sports. Includes resort conditions, event schedules, and athlete data.
cat_sub2_sub10.boundary: Focuses on sports practiced on snow or ice. Excludes summer sports or indoor sports.
cat_sub2_sub10.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about skiing, snowboarding, or other winter sports events and conditions.

cat_sub2_sub12.name: Sports Betting & Odds
cat_sub2_sub12.description: Services providing betting odds, probability calculations, and wagering-related data across multiple sports.
cat_sub2_sub12.boundary: Focuses on betting context. Excludes pure sports statistics without betting context.
cat_sub2_sub12.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides betting odds, probability data, or wagering-related information for sports events.

cat_sub2_sub13.name: Fitness & Training
cat_sub2_sub13.description: Services for workout planning, exercise tracking, nutrition calculation, and athletic training.
cat_sub2_sub13.boundary: Focuses on personal fitness and training. Excludes professional sports competition data.
cat_sub2_sub13.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides workout plans, exercise tracking, nutrition guidance, or training analysis.

cat_sub2_sub14.name: Sports Organizations & Infrastructure
cat_sub2_sub14.description: Services for leagues, clubs, venues, and administrative data. Includes team logos, venue details, and league structures.
cat_sub2_sub14.boundary: Focuses on organizational entities and physical infrastructure. Excludes match-specific data, player statistics, or event results.
cat_sub2_sub14.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about sports organizations, teams as entities, venues, or administrative structures.

cat_sub2_sub15.name: Multi-Sport & General Sports Data
cat_sub2_sub15.description: Services covering multiple sports or providing general sports information not specific to one sport. Includes minor sports and aggregated data.
cat_sub2_sub15.boundary: For services that genuinely span multiple sports or cover minor sports without a dedicated category. Excludes services that fit a single-sport category.
cat_sub2_sub15.decision_rule: Classify here only if the service provides data across multiple different sports, covers a minor sport without a dedicated category, or cannot be placed in a single-sport category.

cat_sub2_sub2.name: Football (Soccer)
cat_sub2_sub2.description: Services for association football (soccer) data. Includes league standings, match results, player stats, and team info.
cat_sub2_sub2.boundary: Covers only association football (soccer). Excludes American football, rugby, and other football codes.
cat_sub2_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about soccer leagues, teams, matches, or players.

cat_sub2_sub3.name: American Football & Rugby
cat_sub2_sub3.description: Services for NFL, NCAA football, rugby union, rugby league, and related competitions. Includes game stats, team data, and schedules.
cat_sub2_sub3.boundary: Covers American football and rugby codes. Excludes association football (soccer) and Canadian football as primary focus.
cat_sub2_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about NFL, NCAA, rugby union, rugby league, or similar gridiron/rugby competitions.

cat_sub2_sub4.name: Basketball
cat_sub2_sub4.description: Services for NBA, WNBA, NCAA basketball, and other basketball leagues. Includes game stats, player rankings, and team data.
cat_sub2_sub4.boundary: Focuses on basketball competitions. Excludes other ball sports like football or baseball.
cat_sub2_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about NBA, WNBA, NCAA, or other basketball competitions.

cat_sub2_sub5.name: Baseball
cat_sub2_sub5.description: Services for MLB and other baseball leagues. Includes player statistics, team data, game schedules, and pre-game lineups.
cat_sub2_sub5.boundary: Covers baseball competitions. Excludes softball, cricket, or other bat-and-ball sports.
cat_sub2_sub5.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about MLB or other baseball competitions.

cat_sub2_sub6.name: Ice Hockey
cat_sub2_sub6.description: Services for NHL and other ice hockey leagues. Includes game details, player stats, team information, and live data.
cat_sub2_sub6.boundary: Focuses on ice hockey. Excludes field hockey, roller hockey, or other hockey variants.
cat_sub2_sub6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about NHL or other ice hockey competitions.

cat_sub2_sub7.name: Tennis & Golf
cat_sub2_sub7.description: Services for ATP, WTA, Grand Slams, PGA Tour, LPGA, and other tennis/golf tournaments. Includes match details, rankings, and schedules.
cat_sub2_sub7.boundary: Covers professional tennis and golf. Excludes other individual sports like athletics or combat sports.
cat_sub2_sub7.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about professional tennis tournaments or professional golf tournaments.

cat_sub2_sub8.name: Cricket
cat_sub2_sub8.description: Services for international cricket, IPL, and other cricket competitions. Includes match schedules, player/team rankings, and series results.
cat_sub2_sub8.boundary: Focuses on cricket. Excludes baseball or other bat-and-ball sports.
cat_sub2_sub8.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about cricket matches, series, players, or teams.

cat_sub2_sub9.name: Combat Sports
cat_sub2_sub9.description: Services for UFC, boxing, martial arts, and other combat sports. Includes fighter profiles, event details, match results, and rankings.
cat_sub2_sub9.boundary: Covers combat sports with direct physical confrontation. Excludes team sports or non-combat individual sports.
cat_sub2_sub9.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about UFC, boxing, martial arts, or other combat sports events and athletes.

cat_sub28_sub1.name: Books, Literature & Sequential Art
cat_sub28_sub1.description: Services for books, authors, comics, manga, quotes, and creative writing/story ideation tools.
cat_sub28_sub1.boundary: Focus on written literary content, sequential art (comics/manga), notable quotations, and tools for generating/planning written narratives.
cat_sub28_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides information about books/authors/comics/manga, notable quotes, or tools for generating/planning written stories, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub10.name: Cinema & Film Showtimes
cat_sub28_sub10.description: Services for querying movie showtimes, cinema listings, and multi-theater schedules.
cat_sub28_sub10.boundary: Real-time cinema schedules and movie screening times.
cat_sub28_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides real-time cinema schedules and movie screening times, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub11.name: Performing & Interactive Arts
cat_sub28_sub11.description: Services for dance, theater, martial arts, performing arts info, and interactive game/experience design.
cat_sub28_sub11.boundary: Performing arts, live interactive experiences, and the design of physical/interactive games or performances.
cat_sub28_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides information, tools, or data for performing arts or designing interactive physical experiences/games, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub12.name: Visual Arts & Crafts
cat_sub28_sub12.description: Services for visual arts, crafts, animation, restoration, and creative project assessment.
cat_sub28_sub12.boundary: Visual arts, crafts, animation tools, and creative project evaluation.
cat_sub28_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides information/tools for visual arts/crafts or assesses creative project potential, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub13.name: Digital Content Discovery
cat_sub28_sub13.description: Services for discovering trending GIFs, memes, short-form videos, and random digital images.
cat_sub28_sub13.boundary: Trending digital images, GIFs, memes, and short-form video data for discovery.
cat_sub28_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides trending/random digital images, GIFs, memes, or short-form video data for discovery, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub14.name: Activities & Recreation
cat_sub28_sub14.description: Services for booking, recommending, or providing info on recreational activities and experiences.
cat_sub28_sub14.boundary: Recreational activity booking, recommendations, and information.
cat_sub28_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily facilitates booking, recommending, or providing info on recreational activities, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub15.name: Cultural Studies, Traditions & Beliefs
cat_sub28_sub15.description: Services for cultural research, traditions, festivals, records, astrology, and social customs.
cat_sub28_sub15.boundary: Cultural traditions, research, formal records, astrology/horoscopes, and non-sport competitions.
cat_sub28_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data/tools for cultural traditions, astrology, or verified record/achievement info, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub16.name: Music & Audio Discovery
cat_sub28_sub16.description: Services for music discovery, playlists, charts, radio stations, and audio content retrieval.
cat_sub28_sub16.boundary: Music/audio content discovery, playlists, charts, and radio information. Excludes tools for creating or editing audio.
cat_sub28_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides music/audio discovery, playlists, charts, or radio station data for listening, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub17.name: Jokes, Humor & Word Games
cat_sub28_sub17.description: Services for jokes, humorous content, word games, puzzles, and riddles.
cat_sub28_sub17.boundary: Joke-based content, word games, puzzles, and riddles.
cat_sub28_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides or generates jokes, humorous text, word games, or puzzles, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub18.name: Sports, Racing & Games
cat_sub28_sub18.description: Services for sports data, racing events, esports, video games, and gaming platforms.
cat_sub28_sub18.boundary: Sports, racing events, martial arts data, video games, esports, and gaming platforms.
cat_sub28_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data, images, or information related to sports, racing, or video games/gaming platforms, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub19.name: NEW: Digital Content Creation & Platforms
cat_sub28_sub19.description: Services for content creation platforms, digital art communities, and creator monetization tools.
cat_sub28_sub19.boundary: Platforms hosting user-generated digital content (art, videos, writing) and tools for creator support/monetization.
cat_sub28_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to a platform for user-generated digital content creation, sharing, or monetization (e.g., Patreon, art communities), classify here.

cat_sub28_sub3.name: Anime & Animation
cat_sub28_sub3.description: Services for anime data, quotes, recommendations, wallpapers, and animated series content.
cat_sub28_sub3.boundary: Anime and animated series content, data, and tools.
cat_sub28_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data, content, or tools related to anime or animated series, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub5.name: Entertainment Industry Databases
cat_sub28_sub5.description: Services for entertainment industry metadata: actors, directors, film/TV details, and new releases.
cat_sub28_sub5.boundary: Entertainment industry metadata and personnel information for film, TV, and music. Excludes real-time showtimes or user-generated content platforms.
cat_sub28_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides reference data about entertainment industry personnel, film/TV metadata, or new release listings, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub7.name: Religious & Spiritual Content
cat_sub28_sub7.description: Services for religious texts, calendars, prayer times, and spiritual guidance tools.
cat_sub28_sub7.boundary: Religious texts, practices, calendars, and spiritual tools.
cat_sub28_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data/content related to religious texts or practices, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub9.name: Event Discovery & Ticketing
cat_sub28_sub9.description: Services for finding events, venues, and managing ticket booking/availability.
cat_sub28_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides event/venue discovery or facilitates ticket booking/management, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub1.name: Product Discovery & Search
cat_sub3_sub1.description: Services for searching, browsing, and discovering products across various platforms using keywords, filters, or categories.
cat_sub3_sub1.boundary: Excludes services that primarily retrieve details for a known product (see Product Information) or recommend products based on user history (see Personalized Recommendations).
cat_sub3_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily helps users find or list products based on search criteria, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub10.name: Store & Location Finder
cat_sub3_sub10.description: Services for finding physical retail stores, outlets, or service points based on location, product category, or other criteria.
cat_sub3_sub10.boundary: Excludes services for checking in-store inventory (see Inventory & Availability) and for retrieving store operational details like menus (outside parent boundary).
cat_sub3_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily locates physical stores or shopping venues, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub11.name: Product Categorization & Taxonomy
cat_sub3_sub11.description: Services that manage or provide access to product classification systems, categories, tags, or sorting methodologies.
cat_sub3_sub11.boundary: Excludes services for classifying products via AI/ML (technical category) and for searching within categories (see Product Discovery & Search).
cat_sub3_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides or manages the hierarchical structure or sorting methods for organizing products, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub13.name: Merchant Information
cat_sub3_sub13.description: Services for retrieving details about sellers, shops, or e-commerce platforms, such as ratings, policies, or profile data.
cat_sub3_sub13.boundary: Excludes services for product reviews (see Reviews & Ratings) and for finding store locations (see Store & Location Finder).
cat_sub3_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides information about a shop, seller, or retail platform itself, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub14.name: Platform & Site Discovery
cat_sub3_sub14.description: Services for finding or listing online shopping websites, marketplaces, or e-commerce platforms where goods can be purchased.
cat_sub3_sub14.boundary: Excludes services for finding physical stores (see Store & Location Finder) and for searching within a platform (see Product Discovery & Search).
cat_sub3_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily identifies or lists available online shopping destinations or marketplaces, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub2.name: Product Information
cat_sub3_sub2.description: Services for retrieving detailed information about a specific, known product, such as its description, specifications, or variants.
cat_sub3_sub2.boundary: Excludes services focused on finding products (see Product Discovery & Search) or on pricing/comparison data (see Price & Offer Information).
cat_sub3_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves detailed data for a single, pre-identified product, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub3.name: Price & Offer Information
cat_sub3_sub3.description: Services focused on retrieving, tracking, or comparing product pricing, discounts, coupons, and promotional offers.
cat_sub3_sub3.boundary: Excludes general product details (see Product Information) and the act of executing a purchase (see Order & Purchase Execution).
cat_sub3_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides pricing data, discount discovery, or offer details, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub4.name: Reviews & Ratings
cat_sub3_sub4.description: Services for accessing and managing user-generated feedback, reviews, ratings, and comments for products or sellers.
cat_sub3_sub4.boundary: Excludes services for tracking user purchase history (see Purchase History) or for general product information (see Product Information).
cat_sub3_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles customer reviews, ratings, or feedback for products/sellers, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub5.name: Inventory & Availability
cat_sub3_sub5.description: Services for checking real-time stock levels, product availability at specific locations, or delivery service coverage.
cat_sub3_sub5.boundary: Excludes services for placing orders (see Order & Purchase Execution) or for general store location lookup (see Store & Location Finder).
