cat_sub3_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily checks if a product is in stock or available for delivery/pickup, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub6.name: Shopping Cart Management
cat_sub3_sub6.description: Services for creating, modifying, and managing a virtual shopping cart, including adding items and calculating totals.
cat_sub3_sub6.boundary: Excludes services for finalizing the purchase (see Order & Purchase Execution) or for product search/discovery (see Product Discovery & Search).
cat_sub3_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles the assembly, modification, or price calculation of a pre-purchase cart, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub7.name: Order & Purchase Execution
cat_sub3_sub7.description: Services that finalize a transaction, executing the purchase, order, or checkout process for one or more products.
cat_sub3_sub7.boundary: Excludes services for cart management (see Shopping Cart Management) and for checking inventory (see Inventory & Availability).
cat_sub3_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily completes the purchase transaction for a product or cart, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub9.name: Personalized Recommendations
cat_sub3_sub9.description: Services that suggest products to users based on their preferences, behavior, purchase history, or stated interests.
cat_sub3_sub9.boundary: Excludes general product search/browsing (see Product Discovery & Search) and access to raw purchase history (see Purchase History).
cat_sub3_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily generates tailored product suggestions for a user, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub1.name: Flight Booking & Management
cat_sub4_sub1.description: Services for searching, booking, checking status, and managing airline flights. Includes flight queries, seat availability, booking, and airline-specific policies.
cat_sub4_sub1.boundary: Excludes general airport information (see Airport & Airline Data) and flight tracking/position data (see Real-Time Transit & Traffic).
cat_sub4_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily books, queries availability for, or manages the reservation/status of a passenger airline flight, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub10.name: Airport & Airline Data
cat_sub4_sub10.description: Services providing reference data about airports, airlines, aircraft, and routes. Includes codes, details, statistics, and direct route lists.
cat_sub4_sub10.boundary: Excludes booking or managing specific flights (see Flight Booking & Management) and real-time flight tracking.
cat_sub4_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily queries static or reference data about airports, airlines, aircraft models, or flight routes, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub11.name: Real-Time Transit & Traffic
cat_sub4_sub11.description: Services providing live data for travel movement. Includes real-time flight/vehicle positions, traffic conditions, transit delays, and live snow/ski reports.
cat_sub4_sub11.boundary: Excludes static schedule planning (see Public Transit Planning) and static airport/airline data.
cat_sub4_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides live, dynamic data on the current location, status, or congestion of transit vehicles or traffic flows, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub12.name: Travel Utilities & Data
cat_sub4_sub12.description: Services providing ancillary travel tools and specific data points. Includes distance calculators, EV charging station finders, baggage allowance queries, and weather for activities.
cat_sub4_sub12.boundary: Excludes core booking services and primary travel planning. Focuses on supporting tools and niche data lookups.
cat_sub4_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a utility (e.g., distance calc) or queries a specific, ancillary travel data point (e.g., baggage rules, charging stations), classify here.

cat_sub4_sub13.name: Dining & Activity Reservations
cat_sub4_sub13.description: Services for booking restaurants and reserving spots for specific activities or attractions at a destination.
cat_sub4_sub13.boundary: Excludes general activity recommendations (see Travel Planning & Content) and core travel component booking (flights, hotels).
cat_sub4_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily books a table at a restaurant or reserves a spot for a specific local activity/attraction, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub15.name: Travel Price Comparison & Search
cat_sub4_sub15.description: Services focused on aggregating and comparing prices from multiple providers for flights, hotels, or other travel components.
cat_sub4_sub15.boundary: Excludes direct booking on a single provider's platform and simple availability queries without price comparison focus.
cat_sub4_sub15.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to compare prices for the same travel product across multiple suppliers or metasearch engines, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub2.name: Accommodation Booking & Management
cat_sub4_sub2.description: Services for searching, booking, and managing hotel and alternative lodging stays. Includes availability checks, room type queries, pricing, and booking modifications.
cat_sub4_sub2.boundary: Excludes vacation rental-specific searches (see Vacation & Specialty Rentals) and lodging reviews/activities (see Travel Planning & Content).
cat_sub4_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily books, queries availability for, or manages the reservation of a hotel or similar short-term lodging stay, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub3.name: Ground Transport Booking
cat_sub4_sub3.description: Services for booking point-to-point ground transportation. Includes taxis, ride-shares, private car hires, and chauffeur services.
cat_sub4_sub3.boundary: Excludes public transit route planning (see Public Transit Planning) and vehicle rentals (see Vehicle Rental).
cat_sub4_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily books a driver-operated vehicle for immediate or scheduled point-to-point transport, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub4.name: Vehicle Rental
cat_sub4_sub4.description: Services for searching and booking self-drive vehicle rentals. Includes cars, SUVs, and other vehicles from rental agencies.
cat_sub4_sub4.boundary: Excludes ride-sharing/taxi booking (see Ground Transport Booking) and vehicle-specific data like EV charging (see Travel Utilities & Data).
cat_sub4_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for or books a self-drive vehicle from a rental agency, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub5.name: Public Transit Planning
cat_sub4_sub5.description: Services for planning journeys using scheduled public transport. Includes bus, train, metro, and regional rail route, schedule, and fare queries.
cat_sub4_sub5.boundary: Excludes real-time vehicle positions/delays (see Real-Time Transit & Traffic) and booking seats on specific carriers (see Intercity Bus & Rail Booking).
cat_sub4_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds routes, schedules, or fares for public transit systems between points, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub6.name: Intercity Bus & Rail Booking
cat_sub4_sub6.description: Services for booking seats on specific intercity coach, bus, or train services. Includes checking availability and reserving seats.
cat_sub4_sub6.boundary: Excludes local public transit planning (see Public Transit Planning) and general train station searches (see Travel Utilities & Data).
cat_sub4_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily books a seat on a specific intercity bus, coach, or train service, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub7.name: Cruise & Specialty Travel
cat_sub4_sub7.description: Services for booking and querying details for cruise ships and other packaged specialty travel (e.g., tours). Includes comparing amenities and dining options.
cat_sub4_sub7.boundary: Excludes standard flight/hotel booking and general tour searching (see Travel Planning & Content).
cat_sub4_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily books or queries details for cruise ship voyages or organized multi-activity tours, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub9.name: Travel Planning & Content
cat_sub4_sub9.description: Services that assist in planning trips by generating itineraries, recommending activities/attractions, and providing destination content like costs and packing lists.
cat_sub4_sub9.boundary: Excludes actual booking of components (see specific booking categories) and real-time traffic/weather (see Travel Utilities & Data).
cat_sub4_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily generates travel plans, recommends activities, or provides destination information guides, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub1.name: Video Content Management
cat_sub41_sub1.description: Services for searching, retrieving metadata, downloading, and managing video content from platforms like YouTube, TikTok, and general web sources.
cat_sub41_sub1.boundary: Focuses on video files/streams. Excludes audio-only, films/TV shows, and user-generated social posts.
cat_sub41_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches, retrieves, downloads, or provides metadata for video files or streams, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub10.name: Regional, Localized & Adult Content
cat_sub41_sub10.description: Services managing content availability, retrieval, or categorization based on region, locale, or adult rating.
cat_sub41_sub10.boundary: Focuses on geographic or content rating filters. Excludes general retrieval without such filters.
cat_sub41_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily checks availability or retrieves content filtered by region/locale or manages adult/explicit content, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub11.name: Marketing, Promotional & Real Estate Content
cat_sub41_sub11.description: Services for creating/managing marketing materials, SEO content, and real estate/accommodation listings.
cat_sub41_sub11.boundary: Focuses on commercial promotion and property listings. Excludes core product data and general media.
cat_sub41_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates/manages marketing/promotional content or manages real estate/accommodation listings, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub13.name: New & Trending Content Discovery
cat_sub41_sub13.description: Services for discovering recently released, newly available, or trending content across platforms.
cat_sub41_sub13.boundary: Focuses on temporal newness and popularity trends. Excludes general search and static catalog browsing.
cat_sub41_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves lists of newly released, latest, trending, or recently updated content, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub2.name: Physical Product Catalog
cat_sub41_sub2.description: Services for managing details, inventory, categorization, and discovery of tangible goods from e-commerce platforms.
cat_sub41_sub2.boundary: Focuses on physical consumer goods for sale. Excludes digital media, real estate, and marketing materials.
cat_sub41_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves or manages information about physical consumer goods for sale, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub3.name: Book & Publication Management
cat_sub41_sub3.description: Services for searching, retrieving metadata, recommendations, and managing information about books and written publications.
cat_sub41_sub3.boundary: Focuses on books and publications. Excludes scripts, educational materials, and other media types.
cat_sub41_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves or manages information about books, including titles, IDs, covers, and reviews, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub4.name: Audio & Music Management
cat_sub41_sub4.description: Services for managing audio tracks, music libraries, playlists, and applying audio effects or adjustments.
cat_sub41_sub4.boundary: Focuses on audio files and music. Excludes video content with audio and non-audio digital assets.
cat_sub41_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages audio files, music tracks, playlists, or applies audio processing effects, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub5.name: Image, GIF & Digital Asset Management
cat_sub41_sub5.description: Services for searching, retrieving, and managing static images, GIFs, templates, and related digital assets.
cat_sub41_sub5.boundary: Focuses on static visual assets and templates. Excludes video, product catalog images, and marketing kits.
cat_sub41_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches, retrieves details for, or manages collections of static images, GIFs, or digital templates, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub6.name: Film, TV & Anime Management
cat_sub41_sub6.description: Services for managing metadata, episodes, and availability for professional films, TV series, and animated content.
cat_sub41_sub6.boundary: Focuses on professional cinematic and animated series content. Excludes general video clips and user-generated content.
cat_sub41_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages information about professional films, TV shows, anime, or their streaming availability, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub7.name: User Content & Collection Management
cat_sub41_sub7.description: Services for managing user-generated posts, social content, personal media libraries, and collections.
cat_sub41_sub7.boundary: Focuses on user-curated or user-created content. Excludes professional media catalogs and public browsing.
cat_sub41_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves/manages user-generated posts or manages a user's personal collection/library of items, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub8.name: Categorization & Taxonomy Management
cat_sub41_sub8.description: Services for retrieving and managing classification systems, genres, tags, and sorting methods.
cat_sub41_sub8.boundary: Focuses on structural classification systems. Excludes the actual content placed within categories.
cat_sub41_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves or manages lists of categories, genres, tags, or sorting methods as a structural system, classify here.

cat_sub41_sub9.name: Specialized Content & Product Analysis
cat_sub41_sub9.description: Services for analyzing, comparing, or tracking interaction with niche products or specialized content.
cat_sub41_sub9.boundary: Focuses on analysis, comparison, or engagement tracking. Excludes simple retrieval and general catalogs.
cat_sub41_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs detailed product comparison, content interaction analytics, or specialized educational/script analysis, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub1.name: Contact & Identity Data
cat_sub42_sub1.description: Services for validating, enriching, and processing contact information like email addresses, phone numbers, and personal identifiers.
cat_sub42_sub1.boundary: Individual contact points and personal identifiers only. Excludes company/organization data and general location/time data.
cat_sub42_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily validates, parses, or enriches an individual's contact point (email, phone) or personal identifier, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub10.name: Search & Discovery Data
cat_sub42_sub10.description: Services for performing searches across the web for various resources like videos, torrents, or content.
cat_sub42_sub10.boundary: General-purpose search engines. Excludes searches within specific platform catalogs and domain keyword searches.
cat_sub42_sub10.decision_rule: If the service is a general-purpose search engine for finding resources (files, videos, web content) by keyword, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub11.name: List & Catalog Data
cat_sub42_sub11.description: Services that provide simple lists, catalogs, or paginated results of items like countries, templates, or jokes.
cat_sub42_sub11.boundary: Static or paginated lists/catalogs. Excludes searches with complex analysis and data retrieval about specific list items.
cat_sub42_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily returns a static or paginated list/catalog of items without complex query analysis, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub12.name: Calculation & Conversion Tools
cat_sub42_sub12.description: Services that perform mathematical calculations, unit conversions, or generate IDs/identifiers from names.
cat_sub42_sub12.boundary: Deterministic calculations and conversions. Excludes data visualization creation and distance calculations between geographic points.
cat_sub42_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs a mathematical calculation, unit conversion, or deterministic identifier generation, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub13.name: Analytics & Insights Data
cat_sub42_sub13.description: Services for analyzing data to derive segments, trends, sentiment, or effectiveness insights.
cat_sub42_sub13.boundary: Data analysis for insights across domains. Includes sales, marketing, social sentiment, and communication effectiveness.
cat_sub42_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes data to derive segments, trends, sentiment, or effectiveness insights, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub14.name: Audio, Speech & Reference Data
cat_sub42_sub14.description: Services for processing audio, generating speech, or retrieving factual reference information like quotes and definitions.
cat_sub42_sub14.boundary: Audio processing/generation and factual reference content. Excludes music video rankings, general media search, and generated humorous text.
cat_sub42_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily processes/generates audio/speech OR retrieves factual/educational reference information, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub15.name: Data Visualization & Creation
cat_sub42_sub15.description: Services for creating, generating, or transforming data into visual charts, graphs, or structured formats.
cat_sub42_sub15.boundary: Creation of visual data representations and structured data outputs. Excludes raw data analysis and simple list/catalog generation.
cat_sub42_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates or generates new data visualizations, charts, or structured data outputs, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub16.name: Platform & API Utility Data
cat_sub42_sub16.description: Services that provide metadata about the API platform itself, such as parameter lists, session status, or data endpoints.
cat_sub42_sub16.boundary: API/system metadata and utility functions. Includes endpoint descriptions, sorting parameters, and session status checks.
cat_sub42_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily returns information about the API's own configuration, parameters, or utility functions, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub2.name: Business & Corporate Data
cat_sub42_sub2.description: Services for retrieving and analyzing information about companies, domains, brands, and business intelligence.
cat_sub42_sub2.boundary: Company/organization data including domains and brands. Excludes individual contact data, product-specific data, and market trend analysis for sales.
cat_sub42_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves or analyzes data about a company, organization, or commercial domain, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub3.name: Product & Commerce Data
cat_sub42_sub3.description: Services for managing, classifying, and retrieving data about specific products, goods, or retail items.
cat_sub42_sub3.boundary: Sellable products and retail items. Excludes company data, market trend analysis, and customer segmentation.
cat_sub42_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles data about a specific sellable product or item (title, ID, details), classify here.

cat_sub42_sub4.name: Media & Content Data
cat_sub42_sub4.description: Services for searching, analyzing, and retrieving data about videos, music, books, films, and other entertainment content.
cat_sub42_sub4.boundary: Entertainment media content and metadata. Excludes general image processing/OCR, social media sentiment, and audio processing/generation.
cat_sub42_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches, lists, or analyzes entertainment media (videos, music, books, movies), classify here.

cat_sub42_sub5.name: Image & Visual Data
cat_sub42_sub5.description: Services for processing, analyzing, searching, or generating images and visual content.
cat_sub42_sub5.boundary: Visual/pixel data of images. Excludes OCR/text extraction, video search/analysis, and chart/graph creation from data.
cat_sub42_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily processes, analyzes, or generates the visual/pixel data of an image, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub6.name: Text & Document Data
cat_sub42_sub6.description: Services for processing, analyzing, generating, or extracting insights from textual content and documents.
cat_sub42_sub6.boundary: Linguistic/content meaning of text. Excludes contact/business data lookup, image-based OCR, and communication content generation.
cat_sub42_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes, generates, or processes the linguistic/content meaning of text, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub7.name: Financial & Market Data
cat_sub42_sub7.description: Services for retrieving and analyzing technical scores, trends, and data for financial instruments and markets.
cat_sub42_sub7.boundary: Financial trading instruments and market analysis. Excludes general sales/marketing data, company information, and economic indicators.
cat_sub42_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides technical analysis, scores, or trend data for trading instruments (stocks, crypto), classify here.

cat_sub42_sub8.name: Geographic & Location Data
cat_sub42_sub8.description: Services for retrieving and calculating data based on geographic locations, timezones, maps, and distances.
cat_sub42_sub8.boundary: Physical locations and geographic calculations. Excludes country lists for platforms, vehicle/asset location data, and map tile generation.
cat_sub42_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily returns data about a physical location or calculates geographic relationships, classify here.

cat_sub42_sub9.name: Web & Domain Data
cat_sub42_sub9.description: Services for checking domain availability, DNS records, SMTP status, and searching for domain names.
cat_sub42_sub9.boundary: Technical domain registration and configuration. Excludes company information associated with domains and email address validation.
cat_sub42_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily checks the technical registration, availability, or configuration of a web domain, classify here.

cat_sub43_sub1.name: Goods & Service Orders
cat_sub43_sub1.description: Services for ordering, managing, and tracking physical goods or scheduled services/appointments.
cat_sub43_sub1.boundary: Covers ordering tangible retail products (clothing, electronics) AND booking intangible services (appointments, classes, consultations).
cat_sub43_sub1.decision_rule: If the service handles ordering physical retail products OR booking/scheduling appointments or professional services, classify here.

cat_sub43_sub2.name: Food & Dining Orders
cat_sub43_sub2.description: Services for ordering food, booking restaurant tables, and managing related transactions.
cat_sub43_sub2.boundary: Exclusively for food/meal ordering, delivery, and restaurant reservations.
cat_sub43_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles restaurant reservations, table bookings, or food/meal ordering, classify here.

cat_sub43_sub3.name: Travel & Accommodation Orders
cat_sub43_sub3.description: Services for booking and managing hotel rooms, vehicle rentals, and other travel services.
cat_sub43_sub3.boundary: Focused on travel-specific bookings like lodging, transportation, and related reservations.
cat_sub43_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles bookings for hotels, lodging, or vehicle rentals, classify here.

cat_sub43_sub4.name: Digital Media & Entertainment Orders
cat_sub43_sub4.description: Services for accessing, downloading, or managing transactions for digital content.
cat_sub43_sub4.boundary: Limited to digital media libraries, access, and downloads (music, videos, podcasts, ebooks).
cat_sub43_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles access, download, or library management of digital media, classify here.

cat_sub43_sub8.name: Financial & Transaction Utilities
cat_sub43_sub8.description: Core functions for calculating costs, checking inventory, managing transaction records, or placing trade orders.
cat_sub43_sub8.boundary: Domain-agnostic supporting functions for orders/transactions, including financial trade order submission.
cat_sub43_sub8.decision_rule: If the service performs supporting functions like calculating totals, checking stock, managing transaction records, OR submitting trade orders for financial instruments, classify here.

cat_sub43_sub9.name: User Profile & Data Retrieval
cat_sub43_sub9.description: Services for retrieving user profile information, account data, or personal details.
cat_sub43_sub9.boundary: Limited to fetching and returning user-specific data like profiles, account info, or personal details.
cat_sub43_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves and returns user profile data, account information, or personal details, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub1.name: Address & Postal Code Services
cat_sub5_sub1.description: Services for geocoding addresses, reverse geocoding coordinates, and querying postal/zip code information.
cat_sub5_sub1.boundary: Converts between addresses/postal codes and geographic coordinates or provides postal code metadata.
cat_sub5_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily converts between addresses/postal codes and geographic coordinates or provides postal code metadata, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub10.name: Map Tiles, Basemaps & Generation
cat_sub5_sub10.description: Services providing raster/vector map tiles, basemap styles, or generating custom static map images.
cat_sub5_sub10.boundary: Serves pre-rendered/stylizable map tiles for display or creates unique map images on-demand.
cat_sub5_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily serves map tiles for display or generates a custom map image based on parameters, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub11.name: Aviation & Airport Data
cat_sub5_sub11.description: Services providing data on airports, airport codes, flight information, and aviation charts.
cat_sub5_sub11.boundary: Provides reference data, codes, or charts specifically for airports and aviation.
cat_sub5_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides reference data, codes, or charts specifically for airports and aviation, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub12.name: Real-Time Vehicle Tracking
cat_sub5_sub12.description: Services providing the real-time or latest known geographic position of vehicles.
cat_sub5_sub12.boundary: Tracks and reports the live or very recent geographic position of a moving vehicle.
cat_sub5_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily tracks and reports the live or very recent geographic position of a moving vehicle, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub13.name: Public Safety & Alerts
cat_sub5_sub13.description: Services providing data on disasters, earthquakes, security advisories, and public safety info.
cat_sub5_sub13.boundary: Provides alerts or information about active disasters, seismic activity, or security threats.
cat_sub5_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides alerts or information about active disasters, seismic activity, or security threats with a geographic component, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub14.name: Environmental, Sensor & Live Feeds
cat_sub5_sub14.description: Services providing localized environmental readings, sensor data, or live camera feeds.
cat_sub5_sub14.boundary: Provides measured environmental conditions or live camera feeds for a specific location.
cat_sub5_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides sensor-based environmental measurements or geographically-located live video feeds, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub15.name: Infrastructure & Facilities
cat_sub5_sub15.description: Services for finding specific types of public or critical infrastructure.
cat_sub5_sub15.boundary: Finds a specific category of public or critical infrastructure (charging stations, schools, hospitals).
cat_sub5_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds a specific category of public or critical infrastructure, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub16.name: Business & Commerce
cat_sub5_sub16.description: Services that support commercial activities like finding stores or calculating service costs.
cat_sub5_sub16.boundary: Facilitates a commercial activity (finding products, comparing prices, calculating costs) using location.
cat_sub5_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily facilitates a commercial activity using location, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub18.name: Specialized & Niche Geography
cat_sub5_sub18.description: Services for highly specific geographic domains like dive sites, ski conditions, or music.
cat_sub5_sub18.boundary: Provides geographic data for a very specific, niche activity or domain not covered elsewhere.
cat_sub5_sub18.decision_rule: If the service provides geographic data for a very specific, niche activity or domain not covered by other categories, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub19.name: Music & Entertainment Geography
cat_sub5_sub19.description: Services providing location-based music data, recommendations, or entertainment info.
cat_sub5_sub19.boundary: Provides data on local music trends, location-tied entertainment, or geographic music recommendations.
cat_sub5_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides music, entertainment, or cultural data tied to specific geographic locations, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub2.name: Location Search & Discovery
cat_sub5_sub2.description: Services for searching, autocompleting, and discovering points of interest (POIs), cities, or areas by name or attribute.
cat_sub5_sub2.boundary: Searches for or lists named locations, cities, or POIs based on names or general attributes.
cat_sub5_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for or lists named locations, cities, or POIs based on names or general attributes, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub3.name: Proximity & Radius Search
cat_sub5_sub3.description: Services that find places or points of interest within a specified radius or distance from a given location.
cat_sub5_sub3.boundary: Finds what is near a specific coordinate or location within a defined radius.
cat_sub5_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds what is near a specific coordinate or location within a defined radius, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub4.name: Routing & Navigation
cat_sub5_sub4.description: Services for calculating routes, distances, travel times, and navigation instructions between locations.
cat_sub5_sub4.boundary: Plans a path, provides turn-by-turn navigation, or calculates optimized travel routes.
cat_sub5_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily plans a path, provides turn-by-turn navigation, or calculates optimized travel routes, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub5.name: Distance Calculation
cat_sub5_sub5.description: Services that calculate the linear or travel distance between two or more geographic points.
cat_sub5_sub5.boundary: Calculates a distance metric (straight-line or travel) between points without providing a full route.
cat_sub5_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates a distance metric between points without providing a full route, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub6.name: Administrative Boundaries
cat_sub5_sub6.description: Services providing data on country, state, city, and other administrative or political boundaries.
cat_sub5_sub6.boundary: Provides information about the borders, hierarchy, or subdivisions of countries, states, or cities.
cat_sub5_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides information about the borders, hierarchy, or subdivisions of countries, states, or cities, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub7.name: Country, City & Administrative Data
cat_sub5_sub7.description: Services providing reference data about countries, cities, capitals, and other administrative entities.
cat_sub5_sub7.boundary: Provides factual, reference-style data about countries, cities, or capitals as entities.
cat_sub5_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides factual, reference-style data about countries, cities, or capitals, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub8.name: Time Zone & Temporal Data
cat_sub5_sub8.description: Services that determine the time zone, local time, sunrise/sunset, or holidays for a location.
cat_sub5_sub8.boundary: Maps a location to its time zone or provides location-based temporal data.
cat_sub5_sub8.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to provide time zone or location-based temporal data, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub9.name: Elevation & Terrain Data
cat_sub5_sub9.description: Services providing elevation (altitude) data for coordinates or terrain-related data.
cat_sub5_sub9.boundary: Provides the height above sea level or visual/analytical terrain models.
cat_sub5_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides the height above sea level or visual/analytical terrain models, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1.name: Movie & TV Metadata
cat_sub6_sub1.description: Services for querying detailed information about movies and TV shows, including titles, plots, cast, crew, ratings, and technical details.
cat_sub6_sub1.boundary: Core descriptive data about a film or series. Excludes where-to-watch data, user-generated content, theater schedules, and personnel-focused queries.
cat_sub6_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves or searches for core descriptive data (title, plot, cast, ID, rating, release date) about a film or series, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub10.name: Video & Stream Data Management
cat_sub6_sub10.description: Services for downloading video/subtitle files, converting formats, or retrieving technical stream/source data.
cat_sub6_sub10.boundary: Acquisition of video files, subtitles, or technical source/stream data. Excludes metadata retrieval and streaming links.
cat_sub6_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily facilitates downloading, format conversion, or retrieves technical data about video files/streams (e.g., source lists, stream IDs), classify here.

cat_sub6_sub2.name: Streaming Availability
cat_sub6_sub2.description: Services that identify which streaming platforms or OTT services offer specific movies or TV shows, including regional availability.
cat_sub6_sub2.boundary: Title-specific availability on digital platforms. Excludes general platform directories and core metadata.
cat_sub6_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily checks where a specific title can be streamed or watched online (e.g., 'is this on Netflix?'), classify here.

cat_sub6_sub3.name: Video Platform Content
cat_sub6_sub3.description: Services for searching, retrieving metadata, and managing content from user-generated video platforms like YouTube, Vimeo, or Twitch.
cat_sub6_sub3.boundary: Content from platforms hosting user/creator-generated videos. Excludes professional movie/TV metadata and file management.
cat_sub6_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with videos, channels, or playlists from platforms like YouTube or Twitch, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub4.name: Theater & Showtimes
cat_sub6_sub4.description: Services for finding movie theaters, checking real-time screening schedules, and managing cinema-related data.
cat_sub6_sub4.boundary: Physical locations and real-time screenings. Excludes digital streaming availability and general metadata.
cat_sub6_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds physical theaters or real-time movie screening schedules for a location, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub5.name: People & Cast
cat_sub6_sub5.description: Services focused on actors, directors, and other film personnel, including filmography, biographical details, and related media.
cat_sub6_sub5.boundary: Information centered on a person in the film/TV industry. Excludes people data returned as part of a title query.
cat_sub6_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves information about a film industry person (actor, director, writer) or their body of work, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub6.name: Recommendation & Discovery
cat_sub6_sub6.description: Services that suggest content or help users discover what to watch based on preferences, similarity, or curated lists.
cat_sub6_sub6.boundary: Personalized suggestions, algorithmic discovery, and user-managed watchlists/favorites. Excludes static public charts.
cat_sub6_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily generates personalized suggestions, helps discover similar titles, or manages user watchlists/favorites, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub7.name: Entertainment News & Community
cat_sub6_sub7.description: Services providing news articles, ranked charts (top/trending), and user-generated reviews or sentiment about content.
cat_sub6_sub7.boundary: Editorial/news content, popularity charts, and user reviews/sentiment. Excludes core metadata and personalized recommendations.
cat_sub6_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily delivers news articles, ranked lists/charts, or retrieves user reviews/sentiment about entertainment content, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub8.name: Anime & Specialized Content
cat_sub6_sub8.description: Services dedicated to anime series/movies, including metadata, quotes, and episode details for this specific genre.
cat_sub6_sub8.boundary: Exclusively or primarily anime content. Excludes general movie/TV services and other genre-specific services.
cat_sub6_sub8.decision_rule: If the service is exclusively or primarily for querying data about anime content (series, movies, characters), classify here.

cat_sub6_sub9.name: Genre & Taxonomy
cat_sub6_sub9.description: Services that provide genre lists, mappings, or allow filtering/searching primarily by genre, category, or content type.
cat_sub6_sub9.boundary: Genre/category as the primary data or filter. Excludes services where genre is one of many parameters in a general search.
cat_sub6_sub9.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to list, map, or enable search/filtering based on genres, categories, or content types, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub1.name: Restaurant Discovery & Listings
cat_sub7_sub1.description: Services for finding, listing, and querying basic information about restaurants, including location, cuisine, and names.
cat_sub7_sub1.boundary: Excludes restaurant reviews/ratings, menu details, booking services, and food delivery/ordering.
cat_sub7_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for, lists, or converts identifiers for restaurants as establishments, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub10.name: Dietary & Allergy Management
cat_sub7_sub10.description: Services that screen for allergens, filter content based on dietary restrictions, or manage specific diets.
cat_sub7_sub10.boundary: Excludes general nutritional calculation, meal planning, and recipe discovery without a specific dietary filter.
cat_sub7_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily identifies allergens or filters recipes/food based on a specific dietary regimen (e.g., ketogenic, vegan), classify here.

cat_sub7_sub11.name: Meal & Diet Planning
cat_sub7_sub11.description: Services that generate daily meal plans, diet charts, or structured eating schedules based on user goals and preferences.
cat_sub7_sub11.boundary: Excludes discovering individual recipes, calculating nutrition for single dishes, and managing food inventory.
cat_sub7_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates a multi-meal plan, schedule, or chart for dietary management, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub12.name: Alcoholic Beverages & Cocktails
cat_sub7_sub12.description: Services focused on information, recipes, and details for alcoholic drinks, cocktails, and wines.
cat_sub7_sub12.boundary: Excludes non-alcoholic drinks, food pairing recommendations, and general restaurant beverage menus.
cat_sub7_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves information or recipes for alcoholic drinks, cocktails, or specific wines, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub15.name: Grocery & Ingredient Products
cat_sub7_sub15.description: Services for searching and retrieving information about packaged food, grocery items, and retail ingredients.
cat_sub7_sub15.boundary: Excludes recipes, restaurant menus, nutritional data for dishes, and placing delivery orders from restaurants.
cat_sub7_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for or lists packaged food items or grocery products, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub16.name: Culinary Travel & Dining Events
cat_sub7_sub16.description: Services related to dining as part of travel, holidays, or special events like cruises, tours, and cost planning.
cat_sub7_sub16.boundary: Excludes standard restaurant discovery in a local city, regular meal delivery, and generic recipe searches.
cat_sub7_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily plans, compares, or costs dining experiences within the context of travel, holidays, or curated events, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub17.name: Personalized Food Recommendations
cat_sub7_sub17.description: Services that suggest restaurants, dishes, or recipes based on user preferences, history, or context.
cat_sub7_sub17.boundary: Excludes simple search/filtering without personalization, retrieving static menus or recipe lists, and meal planning.
cat_sub7_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily generates a suggestion for a restaurant, recipe, or dish tailored to a user's profile or behavior, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub19.name: Food Content & Media
cat_sub7_sub19.description: Services that provide access to aggregated food content, videos, summaries, or broad culinary knowledge bases.
cat_sub7_sub19.boundary: Excludes transactional services (ordering, booking), specific data queries (nutrition, allergy), and personalized recommendations.
cat_sub7_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to aggregated culinary content, summaries, or media (videos, articles) about food, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub2.name: Restaurant Reviews & Ratings
cat_sub7_sub2.description: Services focused on retrieving or submitting user-generated reviews, scores, and ratings for restaurants.
cat_sub7_sub2.boundary: Excludes discovering restaurants, managing menus, booking tables, or processing orders.
cat_sub7_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves, submits, or searches for qualitative feedback or numerical scores for restaurants, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3.name: Restaurant Menus
cat_sub7_sub3.description: Services for retrieving, searching, or managing the menu items and dishes offered by a restaurant.
cat_sub7_sub3.boundary: Excludes restaurant discovery, dish recommendations, nutritional calculation for menu items, and placing orders.
cat_sub7_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves, searches, or converts identifiers for a restaurant's menu or its items, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub4.name: Restaurant Reservations & Booking
cat_sub7_sub4.description: Services for checking table availability and making, managing, or confirming reservations at restaurants.
cat_sub7_sub4.boundary: Excludes discovering restaurants, viewing menus, submitting reviews, and placing food orders.
cat_sub7_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily checks availability or books/secures a dining time and table at a restaurant, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub5.name: Food & Restaurant Ordering
cat_sub7_sub5.description: Services for placing, managing, and confirming orders for food delivery or pickup from restaurants.
cat_sub7_sub5.boundary: Excludes restaurant discovery, menu viewing, table reservations, and recipe-related services.
cat_sub7_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily submits or retrieves an order for specific food items from a restaurant or platform, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub6.name: Recipe Discovery & Search
cat_sub7_sub6.description: Services for finding, listing, and searching through databases of recipes using various filters and criteria.
cat_sub7_sub6.boundary: Excludes detailed recipe instructions, nutritional analysis of recipes, meal planning, and inventory management.
cat_sub7_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches, lists, or browses a collection of recipes, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub7.name: Recipe Details & Instructions
cat_sub7_sub7.description: Services for retrieving comprehensive details, ingredients, and step-by-step instructions for specific recipes.
cat_sub7_sub7.boundary: Excludes searching for recipes, meal planning, nutritional calculation, and checking ingredient inventory.
cat_sub7_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves the full content, ingredient list, or preparation steps for a specific recipe identified by an ID or name, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub8.name: Food & Ingredient Data
cat_sub7_sub8.description: Services providing factual information about specific food items, ingredients, cuisines, or their origins.
cat_sub7_sub8.boundary: Excludes recipes, nutritional calculation, allergy screening, and restaurant-related information.
cat_sub7_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves descriptive data (e.g., origin, cuisine type) about a food item or ingredient, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub9.name: Nutritional Data & Calculation
cat_sub7_sub9.description: Services that calculate, retrieve, or filter based on the nutritional content and calorie information of food and recipes.
cat_sub7_sub9.boundary: Excludes allergy screening, meal planning, general food data, and diet-specific recipe discovery (e.g., ketogenic).
cat_sub7_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates, queries, or filters based on macronutrients, calories, or other nutritional values, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub1.name: Music Playback & Control
cat_sub8_sub1.description: Services for playing, pausing, stopping, and managing the active playback of audio tracks or streams.
cat_sub8_sub1.boundary: Does not include searching for content to play (see Music Discovery & Search) or managing static playlists (see Playlist Management).
cat_sub8_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily controls the real-time audio output (play, stop, volume) for a user, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub10.name: User Library Management
cat_sub8_sub10.description: Services for managing a user's personal music collection, such as saving/removing tracks/albums or listing saved items.
cat_sub8_sub10.boundary: Does not include managing shared or curated playlists (see Playlist Management) or controlling playback (see Music Playback & Control).
cat_sub8_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages the user's personal, saved collection of songs or albums ('My Music', 'Library'), classify here.

cat_sub8_sub11.name: User Profile & Social
cat_sub8_sub11.description: Services for accessing user profile data, following artists/users, and retrieving user-specific listening data (top artists/tracks).
cat_sub8_sub11.boundary: Does not include managing the user's personal music library (see User Library Management) or general artist data (see Artist & Album Metadata).
cat_sub8_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily accesses or modifies a user's social profile, followers, or personal listening statistics, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub14.name: Audio Content Download
cat_sub8_sub14.description: Services focused on downloading audio files (songs, tracks) from various platforms for offline access.
cat_sub8_sub14.boundary: Does not include streaming playback (see Music Playback & Control) or converting text to speech (see Audio Processing & Conversion).
cat_sub8_sub14.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to download an audio file to local storage, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub15.name: Community & User Content
cat_sub8_sub15.description: Services that retrieve or manage user-generated content related to music, such as reviews, comments, questions, and posts.
cat_sub8_sub15.boundary: Does not include official artist metadata (see Artist & Album Metadata) or platform-curated lyrics (see Lyrics & Song Data).
cat_sub8_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles user-contributed content like reviews, comments, or forum posts about music, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub16.name: Live & Broadcast Radio
cat_sub8_sub16.description: Services for accessing live radio station streams, channel listings, and genre-based station directories.
cat_sub8_sub16.boundary: Does not include algorithmically-generated radio stations (see Radio & Station Generation) or music playback from on-demand services (see Music Playback & Control).
cat_sub8_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to live, broadcast radio stations or their channel guides, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub17.name: Audio Processing & Conversion
cat_sub8_sub17.description: Services that modify, enhance, or convert audio, such as applying effects, adjusting volume, or converting text to speech.
cat_sub8_sub17.boundary: Does not include downloading finished audio files (see Audio Content Download) or identifying audio (see Audio Identification).
cat_sub8_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily applies a technical transformation or effect to an audio signal, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub2.name: Music Discovery & Search
cat_sub8_sub2.description: Services for finding music, artists, or albums via queries, keywords, or browsing based on various criteria.
cat_sub8_sub2.boundary: Does not include retrieving predefined charts/rankings (see Charts & Rankings) or getting personalized recommendations (see Recommendations & Personalization).
cat_sub8_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds music/audio content based on a user's active search input (name, keyword, artist), classify here.

cat_sub8_sub3.name: Charts & Rankings
cat_sub8_sub3.description: Services that retrieve official, curated lists of popular songs, albums, or artists from charts like Billboard, Spotify, or YouTube.
cat_sub8_sub3.boundary: Does not include personalized 'trending' or 'for you' lists (see Recommendations & Personalization) or general search results (see Music Discovery & Search).
cat_sub8_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves a formal, time-bound popularity ranking (e.g., weekly top 100, all-time chart), classify here.

cat_sub8_sub4.name: Artist & Album Metadata
cat_sub8_sub4.description: Services that provide detailed information about artists (biography, discography) and albums (tracklist, release date, label).
cat_sub8_sub4.boundary: Does not include song-specific metadata like lyrics (see Lyrics & Song Data) or user-generated content about artists (see Community & User Content).
cat_sub8_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves factual, catalog-level data about an artist or album entity, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub5.name: Song & Track Metadata
cat_sub8_sub5.description: Services that provide information about individual audio tracks, including title, duration, ISRC, and associated artists/albums.
cat_sub8_sub5.boundary: Does not include audio file URLs or playback controls (see Music Playback & Control) or user reviews/ratings (see Community & User Content).
cat_sub8_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves detailed data about a specific song or audio track, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub6.name: Playlist Management
cat_sub8_sub6.description: Services for creating, reading, updating, and deleting static collections of songs (playlists), including adding/removing tracks.
cat_sub8_sub6.boundary: Does not include generating dynamic radio stations based on a seed (see Radio & Station Generation) or controlling active playback (see Music Playback & Control).
cat_sub8_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages a user-curated or platform-curated list of songs as a persistent collection, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub8.name: Recommendations & Personalization
cat_sub8_sub8.description: Services that suggest music, artists, or playlists tailored to a user's taste, listening history, or context (time, location).
cat_sub8_sub8.boundary: Does not include formal popularity charts (see Charts & Rankings) or radio stations (see Radio & Station Generation).
cat_sub8_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides personalized suggestions ('for you', 'similar to', 'based on your taste'), classify here.

cat_sub8_sub9.name: Lyrics & Song Data
cat_sub8_sub9.description: Services focused on retrieving or contributing song lyrics, meanings, annotations, and related textual content.
cat_sub8_sub9.boundary: Does not include general artist biographies (see Artist & Album Metadata) or audio file data (see Song & Track Metadata).
cat_sub8_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles the lyrical content, annotations, or meaning of a song, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub1.name: Medical Diagnostics & Symptom Analysis
cat_sub9_sub1.description: Services that analyze symptoms, assess disease risk, or provide diagnostic information and potential conditions.
cat_sub9_sub1.boundary: Focuses on identifying current or potential health conditions from symptoms or data.
cat_sub9_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes symptoms, assesses disease risk, or provides diagnostic possibilities, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub10.name: Epidemiology & Disease Surveillance
cat_sub9_sub10.description: Services that retrieve, report, or calculate statistics on disease outbreaks, infection rates, and pandemic data.
cat_sub9_sub10.boundary: Population-level disease data, not individual risk.
cat_sub9_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides aggregated, population-level disease statistics or outbreak data, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub11.name: Mental & Behavioral Health
cat_sub9_sub11.description: Services for mental health assessment, tracking, support program discovery, and therapy or counseling management.
cat_sub9_sub11.boundary: Mental, emotional, or behavioral well-being services.
cat_sub9_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily assesses, tracks, or provides resources for mental, emotional, or behavioral well-being, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub12.name: Health Risk & Clinical Analytics
cat_sub9_sub12.description: Services that evaluate individual health risks, perform specialized medical calculations, or analyze clinical data.
cat_sub9_sub12.boundary: Probabilistic future risk scores or complex analytical models on clinical/health data.
cat_sub9_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates health risk scores or performs specialized analytical models on clinical data, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub14.name: Healthcare Operations & Access
cat_sub9_sub14.description: Services that check availability, compliance, insurance verification, or operational status of healthcare services.
cat_sub9_sub14.boundary: Operational status, availability, compliance checks, or insurance verification for healthcare services.
cat_sub9_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily checks operational status, availability, compliance, or insurance for healthcare, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub15.name: Telehealth & Remote Care
cat_sub9_sub15.description: Services that facilitate or manage remote healthcare delivery, virtual consultations, and digital care pathways.
cat_sub9_sub15.boundary: Enables or manages the delivery of healthcare services remotely/virtually.
cat_sub9_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables or manages the delivery of healthcare services remotely/virtually, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub16.name: Health Information & Lifestyle
cat_sub9_sub16.description: Services that provide health news, guidelines, or personalized wellness recommendations for daily living.
cat_sub9_sub16.boundary: General health news, guidelines, or personalized suggestions for wellness and daily living adjustments.
cat_sub9_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides health news or personalized wellness recommendations, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub17.name: Accessibility & Communication Support
cat_sub9_sub17.description: Services that facilitate healthcare communication through sign language translation, detection, or accessibility tools.
cat_sub9_sub17.boundary: Translation to/from sign language or detection of sign language in media for healthcare contexts.
cat_sub9_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily translates to/from sign language or detects sign language for healthcare communication, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub2.name: Treatment & Care Planning
cat_sub9_sub2.description: Services that generate treatment plans, therapy recommendations, or personalized care regimens based on diagnosis or condition.
cat_sub9_sub2.boundary: Creates treatment plans, therapy recommendations, or personalized care regimens.
cat_sub9_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates treatment plans, therapy recommendations, or personalized care regimens, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub3.name: Provider Scheduling & Appointments
cat_sub9_sub3.description: Services for booking, managing, or querying appointments with healthcare providers, doctors, or specialists.
cat_sub9_sub3.boundary: Schedules, creates, or queries appointments with medical professionals.
cat_sub9_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily schedules, creates, or queries appointments with medical professionals, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub4.name: Health Data Management
cat_sub9_sub4.description: Services for recording, retrieving, or managing individual health metrics, history, and clinical data.
cat_sub9_sub4.boundary: Records, stores, or retrieves raw health or clinical data for an individual.
cat_sub9_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily records, stores, or retrieves raw health or clinical data for an individual, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub5.name: Fitness & Activity Tracking
cat_sub9_sub5.description: Services that calculate, track, or analyze physical activity, exercise plans, and associated metrics like calorie burn.
cat_sub9_sub5.boundary: Calculates, tracks, or generates plans for physical exercise and activity.
cat_sub9_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates, tracks, or generates plans for physical exercise and activity, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub6.name: Nutrition & Diet Planning
cat_sub9_sub6.description: Services for calculating nutritional needs, generating meal plans, analyzing food, or managing dietary intake.
cat_sub9_sub6.boundary: Calculates nutritional values, generates dietary plans, or analyzes food for health purposes.
cat_sub9_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates nutritional values, generates dietary plans, or analyzes food for health purposes, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub8.name: Pharmacy & Medication Management
cat_sub9_sub8.description: Services for locating pharmacies, checking stock, ordering drugs, managing medications, or providing drug information.
cat_sub9_sub8.boundary: Facilitates finding, ordering, managing dispensing, or providing information about medications.
cat_sub9_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily facilitates finding, ordering, managing, or providing information about medications, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub9.name: Provider & Facility Directories
cat_sub9_sub9.description: Services for finding and querying information about healthcare providers, hospitals, clinics, or medical facilities.
cat_sub9_sub9.boundary: Searches for or lists healthcare providers or facilities.
cat_sub9_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for or lists healthcare providers or facilities, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub1.name: Real-Time Price & Quote
cat_fin_1_sub1.description: Services providing the current/latest market price, bid/ask, and immediate quote data for individual stocks or indices.
cat_fin_1_sub1.boundary: Focuses on the most recent, live, or current trading data. Excludes historical data, derived metrics, and analytical signals.
cat_fin_1_sub1.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to deliver the most recent, live, or current trading price or quote for an equity, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub10.name: Equity Screening & Filtering
cat_fin_1_sub10.description: Services that filter or screen stocks based on user-defined or predefined criteria to return a subset.
cat_fin_1_sub10.boundary: Selects equities by applying dynamic user-defined filters or returning predefined static lists from screeners. Excludes pattern identification.
cat_fin_1_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily selects a subset of equities by applying financial/metric-based filters or returning a predefined screener list, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub11.name: News & Sentiment Integration
cat_fin_1_sub11.description: Services that provide equity-related news updates, headlines, or sentiment data, often correlated with price.
cat_fin_1_sub11.boundary: Delivers recent news, headlines, or sentiment indicators related to specific equities. Excludes pure market data and analytical reports.
cat_fin_1_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily delivers recent news headlines, updates, or sentiment indicators related to specific equities, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub12.name: Advanced Analytics & Specialized Data
cat_fin_1_sub12.description: Services providing sophisticated, derived analytical datasets or specialized data like regulatory requirements.
cat_fin_1_sub12.boundary: Covers specialized, non-standard analytical datasets (e.g., cost distribution) and regulatory/compliance data. Excludes standard metrics.
cat_fin_1_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a specialized, non-standard analytical dataset or data on regulatory trading constraints, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub13.name: Comprehensive Market Data
cat_fin_1_sub13.description: Services providing broad, multi-faceted data packages covering prices, fundamentals, news, and analytics for equities.
cat_fin_1_sub13.boundary: Offers a combined package of multiple data types (e.g., price, fundamentals, news). Excludes services focused on a single primary data type.
cat_fin_1_sub13.decision_rule: If the service's primary offering is a broad package combining several distinct types of equity market data (price, fundamentals, news, etc.), classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub2.name: Historical Price & Chart Data
cat_fin_1_sub2.description: Services providing past market data (OHLCV) and/or tools to visualize this data as charts over defined time periods.
cat_fin_1_sub2.boundary: Includes raw historical price/volume data and services that primarily render this data into visual charts. Excludes real-time quotes and predictive analytics.
cat_fin_1_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides past OHLCV data or transforms equity data into customizable visual charts/graphs, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub3.name: Valuation & Fundamentals
cat_fin_1_sub3.description: Services providing intrinsic value metrics, key financial statistics, and fundamental company data (e.g., P/E, market cap).
cat_fin_1_sub3.boundary: Focuses on financial ratios, valuation metrics, and core company financials. Excludes raw price data, trading activity, and technical patterns.
cat_fin_1_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides financial ratios, valuation metrics, or core company financial statistics, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub4.name: Corporate Actions & Structure
cat_fin_1_sub4.description: Services providing data on stock splits, dividends, share count changes, and other corporate-initiated changes to capital structure.
cat_fin_1_sub4.boundary: Covers corporate events that alter share count or shareholder equity. Excludes daily trading prices and valuation metrics.
cat_fin_1_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data on corporate events like splits, dividends, or share count changes, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub5.name: Trading Activity & Derivatives
cat_fin_1_sub5.description: Services providing data on trade execution, volume metrics, net flow, and data for equity derivatives like options.
cat_fin_1_sub5.boundary: Covers trading volume, liquidity, buy/sell flow, and data for options/derivatives. Excludes underlying stock prices and fundamentals.
cat_fin_1_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data on trading volume, liquidity, buy/sell flow, or data for equity derivatives, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub6.name: Technical Pattern Signals
cat_fin_1_sub6.description: Services identifying stocks exhibiting specific technical chart patterns or candlestick formations (e.g., Doji, Hammer).
cat_fin_1_sub6.boundary: Focuses on identification of predefined technical analysis chart patterns. Excludes fundamental data and raw historical data.
cat_fin_1_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily identifies equities based on predefined technical analysis chart patterns, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub7.name: Trend Analysis & Prediction
cat_fin_1_sub7.description: Services that analyze data to identify trends, generate price forecasts, or produce buy/sell/hold recommendations.
cat_fin_1_sub7.boundary: Focuses on analytical computation to project future prices, trends, or actionable advice. Excludes raw data feeds and static metrics.
cat_fin_1_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs analytical computation to project future prices, trends, or actionable investment advice, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub8.name: Analyst Research & Targets
cat_fin_1_sub8.description: Services providing external analyst consensus data, price targets, ratings, and professional research reports.
cat_fin_1_sub8.boundary: Covers third-party analyst opinions, target prices, and professional research. Excludes internally calculated valuations.
cat_fin_1_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides third-party analyst opinions, target prices, or professional research reports, classify here.

cat_fin_1_sub9.name: Equity Listings & Reference Data
cat_fin_1_sub9.description: Services providing reference data: lists of stocks, symbols, exchange details, company names, and metadata including SPACs.
cat_fin_1_sub9.boundary: Provides static reference information about what equities exist and their identifying attributes. Includes SPAC-specific listings.
cat_fin_1_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides static reference information about equities (including SPACs) and their identifying attributes, classify here.

cat_fin_8_sub1.name: Regulatory Filings & Reports
cat_fin_8_sub1.description: Services retrieving official regulatory documents (SEC, EDINET) and filing metadata.
cat_fin_8_sub1.boundary: Official documents and filing lists. Excludes processed financial data extracted from filings.
cat_fin_8_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves official regulatory documents or filing lists, classify here.

cat_fin_8_sub2.name: Financial Statements
cat_fin_8_sub2.description: Services providing structured Balance Sheet, Income Statement, and Cash Flow Statement data.
cat_fin_8_sub2.boundary: Core accounting statements. Excludes raw filings and derived ratios/analytics.
cat_fin_8_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves core accounting statements (Balance Sheet, P&L, Cash Flow), classify here.

cat_fin_8_sub3.name: Financial Metrics & Ratios
cat_fin_8_sub3.description: Services calculating or retrieving specific derived financial indicators (ROE, P/E, margins).
cat_fin_8_sub3.boundary: Single or small sets of calculated financial/valuation metrics. Excludes raw statement data, earnings history, and bundled overviews.
cat_fin_8_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides individual or a few calculated financial performance indicators or valuation ratios, classify here.

cat_fin_8_sub4.name: Earnings & Dividends
cat_fin_8_sub4.description: Services focused on earnings data, profit trends, dividend history, and related forecasts.
cat_fin_8_sub4.boundary: Earnings reports, profit data, dividend yields, or earnings forecasts. Excludes general financial statements and broad valuation metrics.
cat_fin_8_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides earnings reports, profit data, dividend yields, or earnings forecasts, classify here.

cat_fin_8_sub5.name: Corporate Profile & Actions
cat_fin_8_sub5.description: Services providing company descriptive info, identifiers, ESG scores, insider activity, and corporate events.
cat_fin_8_sub5.boundary: Descriptive metadata (industry, executives), ESG ratings, insider transactions, and corporate event dates. Excludes financial performance data and regulatory documents.
cat_fin_8_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides descriptive company metadata, ESG/sustainability assessments, insider activity, or corporate event calendars, classify here.

cat_fin_8_sub7.name: Fundamental Aggregates & Screening
cat_fin_8_sub7.description: Services providing consolidated fundamental snapshots or generating screened security lists.
cat_fin_8_sub7.boundary: Bundles of key stats/fundamentals OR filtered lists based on financial criteria. Excludes deep-dives into single statements or single metrics.
cat_fin_8_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a broad overview bundle of key stats OR outputs a screened list based on defined fundamental rules, classify here.

cat_fin_8_sub8.name: Analyst Research & Sentiment
cat_fin_8_sub8.description: Services providing analyst-generated reports, price targets, forecasts, and analysis summaries.
cat_fin_8_sub8.boundary: Third-party analyst research, forecasts, or professional reports. Excludes raw company-reported data and automated scoring models.
cat_fin_8_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides third-party analyst research, forecasts, or professional reports, classify here.

cat_sub43_sub8_sub1.name: Product Information & Inventory
cat_sub43_sub8_sub1.description: Services that retrieve, query, or check the status of products, goods, or items, including their details, pricing, and stock availability.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub1.boundary: Does not include services focused on user orders, financial trades, or transaction records. For order-related product queries, see 'Order Management & History'.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves or checks information about a product/item (price, details, inventory), classify here.

cat_sub43_sub8_sub2.name: Order Management & History
cat_sub43_sub8_sub2.description: Services that create, query, or manage purchase orders, including order details, history, status, and calculations.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub2.boundary: Does not include services for financial instrument trades or generic transaction records. For trade orders, see 'Financial Trading Operations'. For product-only queries, see 'Product Information & Inventory'.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, retrieves, or manages a customer/purchase order (e.g., calculate total, query status/history), classify here.

cat_sub43_sub8_sub3.name: Transaction Record Management
cat_sub43_sub8_sub3.description: Services that submit, query, verify, or delete generic transaction records, often associated with payments, refunds, or platform activities.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub3.boundary: Does not include services for purchase orders or financial market trades. For purchase orders, see 'Order Management & History'. For stock/crypto trades, see 'Financial Trading Operations'.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, reads, verifies, or deletes a payment or platform transaction record, classify here.

cat_sub43_sub8_sub4.name: Financial Trading Operations
cat_sub43_sub8_sub4.description: Services that submit orders for or retrieve information about financial instruments like stocks and cryptocurrencies.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub4.boundary: Does not include services for retail product/purchase orders or generic payment transactions. For those, see 'Order Management & History' and 'Transaction Record Management'.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily submits a trade order or retrieves a list/status for stocks, crypto, or similar financial instruments, classify here.

cat_sub43_sub8_sub5.name: Customer & Account Analytics
cat_sub43_sub8_sub5.description: Services that retrieve or analyze aggregated data about customers, accounts, or user behavior, such as counts, purchase history, or product ratings.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub5.boundary: Does not include services retrieving specific orders, transactions, or product details. For specific records, see 'Order Management & History' or 'Transaction Record Management'.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves aggregated customer data, analytics, or behavioral insights (not a specific record), classify here.

cat_sub43_sub8_sub7.name: Service & Report Catalog
cat_sub43_sub8_sub7.description: Services that retrieve lists or catalogs of available services, reports, tags, or financial instruments without performing a transaction or query on a specific instance.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub7.boundary: Does not include services that query details or status of a specific product, order, or transaction. For those, see the relevant entity-specific categories.
cat_sub43_sub8_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves a list or catalog of available items, services, or reports (e.g., all stocks, all tags, archived reports), classify here.

cat_loc_search_1.name: General Geography & Administration
cat_loc_search_1.description: Services for searching fundamental geographic or administrative entities like countries, cities, regions, coordinates, and postal codes.
cat_loc_search_1.boundary: Focuses on core geographic entities and administrative boundaries.
cat_loc_search_1.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for countries, cities, regions, coordinates, postal codes, or basic administrative boundaries, classify here. Excludes searches for specific business types, points of interest, or activity-specific locations.

cat_loc_search_10.name: Attribute-Based Search
cat_loc_search_10.description: Services that filter or characterize locations by specific attributes like status, hours, cost, or weather.
cat_loc_search_10.boundary: Covers searches where the primary filter is a non-type attribute.
cat_loc_search_10.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for locations based on attributes like operational status, hours, economic data, demographics, or weather conditions, classify here. Excludes searches defined by the type of place.

cat_loc_search_11.name: Proximity & Geospatial
cat_loc_search_11.description: Services focused on proximity calculations, finding nearest locations, or distance metrics.
cat_loc_search_11.boundary: Focuses on nearest entity searches and distance calculations between defined points.
cat_loc_search_11.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds the closest geographic entity to coordinates or calculates distances between specified locations, classify here. Excludes searching within a radius for types of places.

cat_loc_search_2.name: General Location Search
cat_loc_search_2.description: Services that search for nearby places or return location results based on a general query, without a specific thematic filter.
cat_loc_search_2.boundary: For general-purpose location discovery within a radius or based on a query.
cat_loc_search_2.decision_rule: If the service searches for 'places' or 'locations' generically near a point or based on a query, without specifying a type like 'restaurant' or 'park', classify here. Excludes searches filtered by business type, activity, or specific data attributes.

cat_loc_search_4.name: Food & Dining
cat_loc_search_4.description: Services for finding restaurants, cafes, and other food/drink establishments.
cat_loc_search_4.boundary: Focuses on places to eat or drink.
cat_loc_search_4.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for places to eat or drink (restaurants, cafes, bars), classify here. Excludes general retail, entertainment venues, or searches for food cost data without locating establishments.

cat_loc_search_5.name: Retail & Services
cat_loc_search_5.description: Services for locating stores, shops, and consumer service providers.
cat_loc_search_5.boundary: Covers physical goods retail and consumer-facing service providers.
cat_loc_search_5.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for stores to buy physical goods (clothing, electronics) or for consumer service providers (pharmacies, banks, salons), classify here. Excludes dining, entertainment, and business/professional services.

cat_loc_search_6.name: Entertainment & Recreation
cat_loc_search_6.description: Services for finding venues for entertainment, leisure activities, and recreation.
cat_loc_search_6.boundary: Covers both indoor entertainment and outdoor recreation venues.
cat_loc_search_6.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for venues or locations for entertainment, movies, performances, sports, or outdoor activities, classify here. Excludes retail and dining.

cat_loc_search_9.name: Media & Production
cat_loc_search_9.description: Services for finding locations suitable for media production or filming.
cat_loc_search_9.boundary: Focuses on locations for filming, media production, or media broadcast regions.
cat_loc_search_9.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for locations for filming, media production, or lists media broadcast sources by region, classify here. Excludes general tourist spots or public entertainment venues.

cat_sub5_sub7_sub1.name: Country & Regional Group Data Services
cat_sub5_sub7_sub1.description: Services querying countries, continents, or multi-country regional groups as primary entities.
cat_sub5_sub7_sub1.boundary: Focuses on country-level properties, lists, and details, or data about continental/regional groupings. Includes services that return city lists when queried at the country level.
cat_sub5_sub7_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily queries or returns data about: 1) countries (e.g., country details, lists); 2) continents/broad multi-country regions; OR 3) city lists when explicitly queried by country (not by administrative division).

cat_sub5_sub7_sub2.name: City Data Services
cat_sub5_sub7_sub2.description: Services querying cities as primary entities without country/division context.
cat_sub5_sub7_sub2.boundary: Focuses on city-specific data like population, coordinates, or city lists when not filtered by country or administrative division.
cat_sub5_sub7_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here only if the service's primary purpose is to query or return data specifically about cities WITHOUT requiring a country or administrative division as input context (e.g., global city lists, city details by city ID).

cat_sub5_sub7_sub3.name: Administrative Division & Postal Services
cat_sub5_sub7_sub3.description: Services querying sub-national divisions, postal codes, or area-specific metrics.
cat_sub5_sub7_sub3.boundary: Focuses on administrative entities (states/provinces), their subdivisions, relationships, or data keyed by postal codes/regional areas.
cat_sub5_sub7_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service: 1) queries/returns data about states, provinces, or regions as primary entities; 2) uses a postal code as primary input; 3) returns area-specific metrics (e.g., fuel prices for a region); OR 4) returns cities explicitly filtered by administrative division (not country).

cat_sub5_sub7_sub4.name: Multi-Entity Location & Recommendation Services
cat_sub5_sub7_sub4.description: Services handling multiple location types or generating recommendations from location data.
cat_sub5_sub7_sub4.boundary: For services that query generic 'places', use non-geographic codes, or derive recommendations from location properties.
cat_sub5_sub7_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service: 1) queries/returns 'places' or 'locations' of unspecified/heterogeneous types; 2) finds entities using non-geographic codes (e.g., phone prefixes); OR 3) generates recommendations or derived outputs based on location data properties (e.g., activities based on city attributes).
