cat_sub6_sub1_sub1.name: Title & Core Identification
cat_sub6_sub1_sub1.description: Services focused on finding or converting between core identifiers (IDs, titles) for movies and TV shows.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub1.boundary: Includes title-to-ID conversion and basic ID-based lookups. Excludes fetching detailed metadata or searching by complex parameters.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds, converts, or validates core identifiers (ID, title) for a work, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1_sub10.name: Content Classification
cat_sub6_sub1_sub10.description: Services that retrieve formal classifications like genre, content ratings, or parental guidance.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub10.boundary: Focuses on official, descriptive classifications. Excludes subjective tags or user-generated labels.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves genre, content rating, or official keywords for a work, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1_sub12.name: Availability & Streaming Data
cat_sub6_sub1_sub12.description: Services that retrieve where and how content is available across platforms and regions.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub12.boundary: Focuses on streaming links, platform availability, and regional access. Excludes general metadata without availability focus.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves streaming availability, platform links, or regional access data, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1_sub2.name: Basic Metadata Retrieval
cat_sub6_sub1_sub2.description: Services that retrieve essential descriptive details for a specific, identified movie or TV show.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub2.boundary: Includes plot, cast, crew, ratings, and basic technical specs. Excludes comprehensive data bundles, media assets, or availability information.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves a focused set of core descriptive data for a single, pre-identified work, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1_sub3.name: Content Search
cat_sub6_sub1_sub3.description: Services that find movies, TV shows, or people based on a search query, returning lists of potential matches.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub3.boundary: Includes basic text search and unified person/work search. Excludes filtering by multiple structured parameters or retrieving detailed metadata for results.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds a list of works or people based on a textual search query, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1_sub4.name: Advanced Search & Filtering
cat_sub6_sub1_sub4.description: Services that find movies or TV shows using multiple structured criteria like year, genre, or rating.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub4.boundary: Focuses on discovery through parameter-based filtering. Excludes basic text search and retrieval of detailed metadata for results.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds works by applying multiple, specific filter parameters, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1_sub5.name: List & Ranking Retrieval
cat_sub6_sub1_sub5.description: Services that retrieve curated or calculated lists of movies/TV shows, including playlists and rankings.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub5.boundary: Includes pre-defined lists (top-rated) and dynamically generated playlists. Excludes detailed metadata for individual titles.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves or generates a list/ranking of works, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1_sub6.name: Cast & Crew Information
cat_sub6_sub1_sub6.description: Services focused specifically on retrieving actors, characters, or production personnel for a work.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub6.boundary: Includes dedicated cast/crew lookups. Excludes services where this data is part of a broader metadata payload.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves cast, character, or crew data for a work, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1_sub7.name: Ratings, Reviews & Recommendations
cat_sub6_sub1_sub7.description: Services focused on retrieving scores, ratings, review information, or personalized recommendations.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub7.boundary: Includes scores, review aggregates, and recommendation engines. Excludes general popularity metrics in broader metadata.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves scores, ratings, reviews, or recommendations for a work, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1_sub8.name: Media Assets
cat_sub6_sub1_sub8.description: Services that retrieve visual media like posters, backdrops, or trailers for a title.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub8.boundary: Focuses on retrievable media files. Excludes textual metadata or other non-media assets.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves images, posters, trailers, or visual assets for a work, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1_sub9.name: Episode & Season Data
cat_sub6_sub1_sub9.description: Services focused on TV series metadata at the season or episode level.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub9.boundary: Includes episode lists and per-episode details. Excludes metadata for the series as a whole or for movies.
cat_sub6_sub1_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves data about TV series seasons or individual episodes, classify here.
